prompts.title: Sloth Hanging from Candy Cane Christmas Card
prompts.prompt: An adorable printable Christmas card design, aspect ratio 1:1.4. A cute, slow-moving sloth hangs upside down from a candy cane that stretches horizontally across the top of the card. The sloth is wearing a festive ugly Christmas sweater with a pixelated snowflake pattern. He is holding a star tree topper in his slow claws, trying to reach a Christmas tree that is just out of frame. The background is a solid deep teal color to make the sloth pop. Below the sloth, the text reads: {argument name="text" default="Slowly getting into the Spirit"} in a relaxed, hand-lettered font.

prompts.title: Polar Bear and Penguin Scarf Christmas Card
prompts.prompt: A heartwarming and whimsical Christmas card cover, aspect ratio 1:1.4. A massive, fluffy white polar bear sits on the left, and a tiny, round penguin stands on the right against a clean, ice-blue background. They are connected by a comically long, oversized red and green knitted scarf that is wrapped multiple times around the bear's neck and then loops down to wrap snugly around the tiny penguin. The penguin is looking up at the bear with admiration. The texture of the fur and the knit wool is visible and soft. Simple white snowflakes fall gently around them. No text, just a sweet image of friendship.

prompts.title: Gingerbread Yoga Class Christmas Card
prompts.prompt: A funny and adorable printable Christmas card design, aspect ratio 1:1.4. The background is a solid, clean pastel mint green. The illustration features a "Yoga Class" of five cute gingerbread men cookies. The central gingerbread man is standing on one leg in a "Tree Pose," balancing a gumdrop on his head with a focused expression. To his left, another cookie is attempting a "Downward Dog" pose but his arm has crumbled slightly, revealing delicious cookie crumbs. To the right, a gingerbread man is meditating in "Lotus position" with his icing eyes closed. They all have white icing details and red red-hot candy buttons. The style is a clean, flat vector illustration with soft shadows. Text at the top reads: {argument name="text" default="Find Your Inner Piece"} in a playful, rounded white font.

prompts.title: Felt Appliqué Fox Cub
prompts.prompt: A cozy, tactile Christmas card design, aspect ratio 1:1.4. The illustration looks entirely like handmade felt appliqué stitching. A cute orange fox cub made of fuzzy felt fabric sits in layers of white felt snow, looking up at a felt Christmas tree decorated with colorful button ornaments. The texture of the wool fibers and the stitching around the edges is clearly visible. The background is a soft blue felt sky.

prompts.title: Pug with Reindeer Antlers and Clown Nose
prompts.prompt: A funny and cute printable card, aspect ratio 1:1.4. A close-up photographic portrait of a chubby pug dog's face. It is reluctantly wearing a headband with brown felt reindeer antlers and a very bright, glowing red clown nose over its own nose. The pug has a serious, slightly judging expression, staring straight at the camera. The background is blurred festive red lights.

prompts.title: Alpaca Overloaded with Presents
prompts.prompt: A cute and chaotic Christmas card, aspect ratio 1:1.4. A fluffy white alpaca stands against a solid mint green background. Its back is overloaded with an impossibly tall, precarious stack of colorful wrapped Christmas presents with bows that are wobbling wildly. The alpaca has a patient, slightly strained expression, and its skinny legs are shaking slightly under the weight.

prompts.title: Koala Clinging to Christmas Tree
prompts.prompt: A cute printable Christmas card design, aspect ratio 1:1.4. A grey koala bear is clinging tightly to the trunk of a small, decorated Christmas tree instead of a eucalyptus tree, looking content and sleepy. The tree is covered in shiny silver tinsel and colorful baubles. The koala wears a tiny red bow tie. Solid pastel green background. Soft, crayon drawing texture.

prompts.title: Bear Baker with Living Gingerbread Men
prompts.prompt: A charming illustration of a brown bear baker, aspect ratio 1:1.4. The friendly bear wears a floral apron and a chef's hat, covered in white flour dust. It is happily rolling out dough on a wooden table, surrounded by gingerbread men cookies that have come to life and are running around the kitchen counter laughing. Warm, storybook art style.

prompts.title: Dormouse Asleep in Teacup
prompts.prompt: A cozy miniature Christmas illustration, aspect ratio 1:1.4. A tiny dormouse is curled up asleep inside a ceramic teacup that is decorated with a festive red and green holly pattern. The mouse is covered by a small green leaf blanket. The teacup sits on a saucer next to a miniature mince pie on a wooden table surface. Watercolor and colored pencil style.

prompts.title: Octopus Decorating Coral Christmas Tree
prompts.prompt: A whimsical underwater Christmas card, aspect ratio 1:1.4. A friendly purple octopus is using all eight arms to decorate a large piece of branching coral that looks like a Christmas tree. It's hanging shiny seashells, starfish, and strings of pearls on the branches. A Santa hat floats just above its head. Bubbles rise against a deep blue ocean background. Cute cartoon style.

prompts.title: Magical Snowy Owl Delivering Mail
prompts.prompt: A magical Christmas illustration, aspect ratio 1:1.4. A fluffy white snowy owl with bright yellow eyes is in mid-flight against a dark blue, star-filled night sky. It carries a small, elegant red envelope sealed with a gold wax seal in its beak. A tiny sprig of holly is tucked behind its ear like a feather. The style is detailed and enchanting.

prompts.title: Sneaky Raccoons Stealing Santa's Treats
prompts.prompt: A funny Christmas card design, aspect ratio 1:1.4. A scene at night by a fireplace. Two sneaky raccoons wearing their natural "bandit mask" markings and tiny Santa hats are caught in the act. One is lifting a glass of milk, and the other has a chocolate chip cookie in its mouth, taken from a plate labeled 'For Santa'. Only their eyes are illuminated by the firelight. Cute, mischievous illustration style.

prompts.title: Penguin Skiing with Candy Canes
prompts.prompt: A whimsical action illustration for a Christmas card, aspect ratio 1:1.4. A cheerful penguin wearing vintage pilot goggles and a flying red scarf is skiing down a snowy slope. Instead of skis, it is using two large peppermint candy canes. Snow sprays out behind it dynamically. In the background, there are simple cartoon pine trees. Fun, dynamic cartoon style with bold outlines.

prompts.title: Sleeping Polar Bears
prompts.prompt: A heartwarming printable Christmas card, aspect ratio 1:1.4. A large mother polar bear is lying down fast asleep, curled up in a snowy drift. A tiny polar bear cub is sleeping soundly on her broad back, wearing a miniature red and green striped nightcap. A gentle snowfall surrounds them against a soft light blue background. The style is a tender children's book illustration with soft colors.

prompts.title: Tuxedo Cat Tangled in Ribbon
prompts.prompt: A funny printable Christmas card illustration, aspect ratio 1:1.4. A mischievous black and white tuxedo cat is comically tangled in a massive explosion of red satin gift ribbon and torn festive wrapping paper on a clean white background. Only its wide, surprised green eyes and one paw are visible from the center of the shiny red chaos. A roll of tape is stuck to its tail. Dynamic cartoon sketch style.

prompts.title: Singing Birds on Holly Branch
prompts.prompt: A cute and detailed printable Christmas card, aspect ratio 1:1.4. Five tiny, plump garden birds (a robin, a blue tit, a sparrow, a goldfinch, a wren) are perched in a row on a snow-covered holly branch with red berries. Each bird wears a different miniature knitted winter hat (bobble hat, beanie, earflap hat) and they all have their beaks open as if singing. The style is a delicate watercolor and ink drawing on textured paper.

prompts.title: Squirrel with Wrapped Acorn
prompts.prompt: A whimsical printable Christmas card, aspect ratio 1:1.4. A busy red squirrel with fluffy ear tufts stands on a snow-covered tree branch against a pale winter sky. It is holding a single acorn that is meticulously wrapped in tiny red paper with a gold bow, presenting it forward. Behind it, a pile of similarly wrapped acorns is stacked inside a hollow log. The squirrel wears a tiny green knit scarf. Colored pencil texture style.

prompts.title: Corgi Stuck in Chimney
prompts.prompt: A humorous Christmas card illustration, flat graphic style, aspect ratio 1:1.4. A red brick chimney stack stands against a dark blue night sky with stars. Stuck upside down in the top opening of the chimney is the fluffy orange and white butt of a Corgi dog, with its short back legs wiggling in the air. A tiny Santa hat is falling off one foot. Smoke puffs out around it in the shape of question marks.

prompts.title: Fluffy Highland Cow with Christmas Lights
prompts.prompt: A charming and fuzzy Christmas illustration, aspect ratio 1:1.4. A close-up portrait of a super fluffy ginger Scottish Highland cow. Its shaggy hair completely covers its eyes, but colorful tangled Christmas lights that are glowing, and small shiny red baubles, are caught in its bangs and long horns. Light snowflakes dust its fur. The background is a soft, blurred snowy pasture. Painterly, textured style.

prompts.title: Long Dachshund Christmas Card
prompts.prompt: A funny flat vector illustration for a Christmas card, aspect ratio 1:1.4. A very long brown dachshund dog stretches horizontally across the entire card against a solid pale blue background. It is wearing an absurdly long, red knitted turtleneck sweater with a repeating pattern of white reindeer and snowflakes. The sweater is so long it sags in the middle, touching the ground. The dog looks content. Text below reads: "Longing for Christmas."

prompts.title: Whimsical Hedgehog Christmas Card
prompts.prompt: A whimsical printable Christmas card illustration, aspect ratio 1:1.4. A small, round hedgehog is curled up into a ball on a clean cream background. Its spines are hilariously covered with tiny, colorful Christmas baubles, miniature candy canes, and bits of shiny tinsel that have gotten stuck to them. The hedgehog has a slightly confused but happy expression, with one eye peeking out. The style is a gentle watercolor painting with soft textures.

prompts.title: Kawaii Otters with Candy Cane
prompts.prompt: An adorable printable Christmas card design, aspect ratio 1:1.4. Two cute furry sea otters are floating on their backs in icy blue water, holding paws. Instead of their usual rock, they are jointly holding a large red and white striped peppermint candy cane across their chests. Both wear tiny Santa hats titled on their heads. Soft white ripples surround them. The style is a kawaii cartoon with soft shading.

prompts.title: Santa's Laundry Line Christmas Card
prompts.prompt: A whimsical and domestic Christmas scene, aspect ratio 1:1.4. A clothesline made of festive tinsel is strung across a pale blue snowy sky background. Pinned to the line with wooden clothespins are Santa's iconic clothes: his big red jacket with white fur trim, his red trousers, a pair of red suspenders, and a pair of humorous white boxer shorts covered in a pattern of green holly leaves and red berries. A small bluebird is perched on the clothesline. The style is a clean, flat illustration with a paper-cut texture effect. A unique and funny take on Santa getting ready.

prompts.title: Pug Disguised as Elf Christmas Card
prompts.prompt: A funny, flat vector illustration for a Christmas card, aspect ratio 1:1.4. The image shows a horizontal lineup of four Santa's elves dressed in green tunics, red and white striped tights, and pointy hats. In the middle of the line, trying to blend in, is a beige Pug dog standing on its hind legs, wearing the exact same elf costume. The elves on either side are looking at the dog with side-eye suspicion, while the dog looks straight ahead with a blank, innocent expression. The background is a solid festive red. Text at the bottom reads: {argument name="text" default="Day 24: They still suspect nothing."} in a typewriter font.

prompts.title: Reindeer Flight School Christmas Card
prompts.prompt: A charming and funny Christmas card design, aspect ratio 1:1.4. The scene depicts a "Reindeer Flight School." A cute, clumsy baby reindeer with a slightly oversized red nose is hovering just a few inches off the snowy ground, legs splayed out in all directions, looking panicked but determined. He is wearing vintage aviator goggles and a brown leather helmet. Behind him, a tiny red robin bird is using its beak to push the reindeer's bottom to help him stay up. The background is a simple, pale blue winter sky with fluffy white clouds. The style is a detailed colored pencil drawing on textured paper.

prompts.title: Marshmallow Hot Tub Christmas Card
prompts.prompt: A kawaii style printable Christmas card illustration, aspect ratio 1:1.4. The view is a top-down perspective looking into a red ceramic mug filled with rich, brown hot chocolate. Inside the mug, three adorable white marshmallow characters are relaxing as if it's a hot tub. One marshmallow is leaning back with drawn-on sunglasses made of chocolate icing. Another is wearing a tiny candy cane snorkel. The third is floating on a square of chocolate bar like a raft. Steam swirls rise up in the shape of hearts. The background outside the mug is a soft pink with white polka dots. High resolution, bright colors, vector art style.

prompts.title: Hamster with Cranberry Christmas Card
prompts.prompt: An exquisite, printable Christmas greeting card illustration in a soft, storybook watercolor style, aspect ratio 1:1.4. The scene is a close-up macro view of a chubby, golden-brown hamster wearing a tiny, knitted red Santa hat. The hamster sits at a miniature wooden table made from a popsicle stick. He is holding a single, bright red cranberry with both paws, looking absolutely delighted with stuffed cheeks. On the table, there is a thimble serving as a cup and a tiny plate with a crumb of cheese. The background is a warm, creamy off-white paper texture with faint watercolor holly leaves in the corners. The mood is cozy, tiny, and heartwarming.

prompts.title: Cat in Christmas Lights Christmas Card

prompts.title: Snowman and Birds on Park Bench
prompts.prompt:
A beautiful and charming winter illustration, perfect for a printable greeting card. A friendly snowman with a carrot nose, coal eyes, and a smile sits on a weathered green wooden park bench partially covered in soft snow. The snowman is dressed in a dark brown fedora and a warm red and yellow patterned scarf, with twig arms resting on the bench.

A vibrant red cardinal is perched on the back of the bench. Next to the snowman sits a small burlap sack overflowing with birdseed. Several cute black-capped chickadees are happily eating seeds on the bench and on the snowy ground in the foreground.

The background shows a serene, snowy landscape with a forest of pine trees under a pale, overcast sky with large, soft snowflakes gently falling. The entire scene has a soft, painterly texture with a gentle, embossed quality, creating a heartwarming and peaceful mood.

High detail, intricate, beautiful illustration, printable quality. --ar 1:1.4

prompts.title: Premium liquid glass Bento grid product infographic with 8 modules
prompts.prompt: Input Variable: [insert product name] Language: [insert language] System Instruction: Create an image of premium liquid glass Bento grid product infographic with 8 modules (card 2 to 8 show text titles only). 1) Product Analysis: → Identify product's dominant natural color → "hero color" → Identify category: FOOD / MEDICINE / TECH 2) Color Palette (derived from hero): → Product + accents: full saturation hero color → Icons, borders: muted hero (30-40% saturation, never black) 3) Visual Style: → Hero product: real photography (authentic, premium), 3D Glass version [choose one] → Cards: Apple liquid glass (85-90% transparent) with Whisper-thin borders and Subtle drop shadow for floating depth and reflecting the background color → Background stays behind cards and high blur where cards are [choose one]: - Ethereal: product essence, light caustics, abstract glow - Macro: product texture close-up, heavily blurred - Pattern: product repeated softly at 10-15% opacity - Context: relevant environment, blurred + desaturated → Add subtle motion effect → Asymmetric Bento grid, 16:9 landscape → Hero card: 28-30% | Info modules: 70-72% 4) Module Content (8 Cards): M1 — Hero: Product displayed as real photo / 3D glass / stylized interpretation (choose one)in beautiful form + product name label M2 — Core Benefits: 4 unique benefits + hero-color icons M3 — How to Use: 4 usage methods + icons M4 — Key Metrics: 5 EXACT data points Format: [icon] [Label] [Bold Value] [Unit] FOOD: Calories: [X] kcal/100g, Carbs: [X]g (fiber [X]g, sugar [X]g), Protein: [X]g, [Key Vitamin]: [X]mg ([X]% DV), [Key Mineral]: [X]mg ([X]% DV) MEDICINE:Active: [name], Strength: [X] mg, Onset: [X] min, Duration: [X] hrs, Half-life: [X] hrs TECH:Chip: [model], Battery: [X] hrs, Weight: [X]g,[Key spec]: [value], Connectivity: [protocols] M5 — Who It's For: 4 recommended groups with green checkmark icons | 3 caution groups with amber warning icons M6 — Important Notes: 4 precautions + warning icons M7 — Quick Reference: → FOOD: Glycemic Index + dietary tags with icons → MEDICINE: Side effects + severity with icons → TECH: Compatibility + certifications with icons M8 — Did You Know: 3 facts (origin, science, global stat) + icons Output: 1 image, 16:9 landscape, ultra-premium liquid glass infographic.

prompts.title: Mr Bean Mini Cooper Chaos
prompts.prompt: Hyper-realistic, chaotic wide-angle fish-eye dashboard shot of a speeding {argument name="car" default="vintage Mini Cooper"}. Characters & Identity: {argument name="driver" default="Mr. Bean (Rowan Atkinson)"} driving maniacally, steering with knees, holding a cup of tea. Passenger: photorealistic human, face and hair 100% identical to the uploaded reference, wearing a {argument name="outfit" default="modern oversized printed baggy t-shirt"}, enjoying the thrill of speed. Back seat: 3D animated Chucky (evil doll) and Alien Xenomorph, physically squished together, faces pressed against the side window in humorous distortion. Outside windshield: 3D animated Green Mean Gremlin splattered against glass, furious expression. Through rear window: police car in pursuit. Scene & Environment: atermark, text Harsh daylight, strong natural shadows Motion blur on passing scenery for extreme sense of speed Interior of Mini Cooper rendered with photorealistic detail (dashboard, steering wheel, seats, reflections) Camera & Composition: Wide-angle fish-eye perspective, exaggerating speed and chaos Cinematic framing, dynamic, immersive POV High-fidelity textures, realistic lighting, reflections, and depth Mood & Realism: Hyper-realistic photorealism for all human and Mini Cooper elements 3D animated characters integrated seamlessly into scene Vibrant, chaotic, fast-paced, cinematic, humorous

prompts.title: Edo-period Ukiyo-e reinterpretation of a modern scene
prompts.prompt: A Japanese Edo-period Ukiyo-e woodblock print. The overall feeling is a surreal collaboration between masters like Hokusai and Hiroshige, reimagining modern technology through an ancient lens. **The scene:** {argument name="modern scene" default="a busy Shibuya scramble crossing"} **Edo transformation logic:** Characters wear Edo-era kimono but perform modern actions. All technology is transformed into surreal Edo equivalents: * Smartphones are glowing, illustrated paper scrolls being read intently. * Metro stations and trains are giant articulated wooden centipede carriages shuffling through crowds. * Skyscrapers are reimagined as endless, towering wooden pagodas reaching into dramatic clouds. * Robots and mecha appear as giant, armored woodblock golems. The composition uses a flattened perspective with large, bold, hand-carved ink outlines. The background features heavily stylized Ukiyo-e wave patterns and dramatic, swirling clouds, with a distant Mt. Fuji visible on the horizon. The image must look like a physical print, not a digital painting. * Texture: strong visible wood grain texture and rough paper fibers throughout the piece. * Printing imperfections: pigment bleeding is evident. Simulate hand-pressed plates with slight color misalignment for authenticity. * Color palette: strictly limited to traditional mineral pigments, with dominant use of Prussian blue, vermilion red, and muted yellow ochre. * Lighting: soft, flat, shadow-free lighting with no digital gradients. Aspect ratio is 3:4 vertical poster. Include vertical Japanese calligraphy describing the scene and a traditional red artist seal stamp in a corner.

prompts.title: Dramatic High Contrast Studio Portrait
prompts.prompt: A dramatic, high-contrast studio portrait of a {argument name="subject description" default="man with dark messy hair and a well groomed beard"}, wearing {argument name="eyewear" default="black rectangular glasses"} and a {argument name="shirt color" default="dark olive-green"} collared shirt. He is leaning forward over the curved backrest of a black chair, gazing intently down towards the lens. The entire setting features a striking, solid vibrant crimson-red background wall that transitions into deep shadows toward the lower right, establishing a highly atmospheric and moody character aesthetic. He Is leaning forward with his head tilted down and slightly to the left, resting both forearms on the horizontal backrest of a chair. His gaze is directed downwards towards the camera with a serious, intense expression. He is wearing a smooth woven olive-green collared shirt, fully buttoned up with visible collar points and a center placket. The sleeves are rolled up neatly to his mid-forearms, creating fabric folds near his elbows. A chunky, dark signet-style ring is visible on the index finger of his left hand, along with a dark ring on his right hand. A metallic chain bracelet consisting of small interlocking links is wrapped around his left wrist. An eye-level, medium close-up shot that captures the subject from the waist up, focusing heavily on his facial expression, hair texture, and upper torso. Strong, directional artificial studio lighting coming from the top-left. prompts.title: Anime Film Storyboard Board
prompts.prompt: STORY Panel 1 Warm cloudy evening after light rain. A small neighborhood park glows under golden sunset light. Children are laughing and playing together. In the distance, the long-haired girl sits alone on a swing. The empty swing beside her slowly moves in the wind. Camera note: Wide establishing shot. ⸻ Panel 2 Close-up. The girl watches the other children from afar while quietly spinning her handmade paper windmill. A faint sad smile appears. Camera note: Slow push-in. ⸻ Panel 3 A sudden gust of wind lifts the paper windmill from her hands. It flies across the park. The girl stands and runs after it. Camera note: Tracking shot. ⸻ Panel 4 The windmill lands near a group of children playing. The girl hesitates and freezes. She is too shy to approach them. From her perspective the group feels intimidating and distant. Camera note: Low-angle emotional POV. ⸻ Panel 5 One of the children notices the windmill. Instead of simply returning it, the group carefully repairs a torn corner and decorates it with colorful drawings and messages. The girl watches in surprise. Camera note: Medium emotional shot. ⸻ Panel 6 The kindest child walks toward her with a warm smile and gently offers the windmill back. The group invites her to join them. Camera note: Soft close-up. ⸻ Panel 7 The girl’s eyes fill with tears. For the first time she smiles openly. She runs toward the group while clutching the repaired windmill. Camera note: Dynamic running shot with sunset backlight. ⸻ Panel 8 Final emotional wide shot. The girl and her new friends laugh together beneath glowing sunset clouds. The once-empty swing gently moves in the background. The repaired windmill spins in the warm evening breeze. Mood: {argument name="mood" default="Bittersweet, heartwarming, unforgettable"}. Camera note: Large cinematic ending frame. FINAL GOAL Create a breathtaking premium {argument name="style" default="anime film development board"} that tells a deeply emotional story about {argument name="theme" default="loneliness, kindness, and finding friendship"}. The artwork should feel like a lost masterpiece from a classic theatrical anime studio, with stunning painted backgrounds, expressive character acting, emotional visual storytelling, and a touching ending that leaves a lasting emotional impact.

prompts.title: Spy Thriller Comedy Storyboard Prompt
prompts.prompt: Early morning. Total silence. A hyper-serious spy thriller vibe. A sleek black SUV idles outside a quiet suburban house. Two “tactical” men in earpieces whisper intensely. “Target is inside.” “Movement in the kitchen.” “Stand by.” Inside the house— A dad in sweatpants stands in front of the fridge, staring into it like it contains classified secrets. Cut back outside. “Subject has opened the cold storage unit.” “Thermal spike detected.” Inside, he pulls out milk. Shakes it. Sniffs it. Makes a face. Outside, one agent squints at a tablet. “He’s analyzing chemical integrity.” The front door creaks open. The dad steps onto the porch in mismatched slippers to grab the newspaper. Both agents snap alert. “Target exiting the compound.” “Visual confirmed. He looks… unstable.” The dad waves awkwardly at them. They freeze. He squints. “You guys DoorDash?” Beat. They look at each other. Inside the SUV, a third “commander” barks through the radio: “Abort. Wrong house. Again.” The agents slowly lower their sunglasses. The dad shrugs, walks back inside. Cut to kitchen. He sits at the table with his cereal. Turns on the TV. BREAKING NEWS: “International spy ring apprehended after staking out random suburban dad for third straight day.” He crunches loudly. Milk drips down his chin. He sighs. “Finally.”

prompts.title: Wind Turbine Technical Schematic

The overall title, positioned at the top-center in a professional sans-serif font, is "{argument name="title" default="Wind Turbine Components"}". The composition is dominated by the tall turbine, which is positioned slightly to the left, and its cutaway nacelle. The turbine stands on a detailed gray modular tower (Component 6), which rests on a ground plane of green rolling hills and foliage, alongside a detailed grey Transformer (Component 7). To the far right, two detailed steel lattice power pylons connect the transformer via high-voltage lines, labeled "To Power Grid". At the top of the tower sits the large nacelle, with a detailed internal cutaway revealing a visible multi-stage Gearbox (Component 4) with internal blue gears and a complex copper-coil Generator (Component 5), both cut to show their internal structure. The Generator housing is cut away to show the stator and rotor coils. Leading from the front is the Hub (Component 2), connecting three enormous, clean white aerodynamically-shaped Rotor Blades (Component 1) (labeled with bullet points: "Capture the wind energy.", "Designed like airplane wings...", "When wind passes over them..."). Inside the cutaway, the Hub leads to a detailed blue Main Shaft (Component 3, labeled with bullet points: "Transfers mechanical energy from rotor to the gearbox.", "Uses Direct Drive in some modern turbines.") that connects to the Gearbox. Multiple distinct, precise gray call-out lines with blue circular numbered bullet points (1 through 7) and corresponding text blocks are positioned around the diagram, connected to specific components. A large, blue-to-white gradient angled banner at the bottom-left features the bold, white text "{argument name="banner text" default="Power systems protection"}". The text for each component and its function is perfectly transcribed and legible as in image_1.png. The entire scene is sharply focused, like a technical patent illustration, with clean lighting.

prompts.title: Scribbly MS Paint Redraw
prompts.prompt: Take the exact face from the attached reference image as the primary subject. Use the precise facial features, bone structure, eye shape, nose, lips, jawline, skin tone, and expression of the woman shown in the reference photo. Maintain her exact face with high fidelity as the core element, but redraw the entire image in the most {argument name="style" default="clumsy, scribbly, and utterly pathetic way"} possible. Create a terrible amateur {argument name="software" default="MS Paint drawing"} on a {argument name="background" default="pure white background"} using only a mouse, with jagged, uneven lines, horrible proportions, and obvious mistakes everywhere. Make the hair look like it was drawn with the pencil tool in 5-pixel strokes, messy and scribbly with random stray lines sticking out. The eyes should be slightly misaligned, one bigger than the other, with crooked eyelashes and uneven pupils. The nose should be awkwardly shaped, the mouth lopsided and poorly filled. Skin should have visible pixelation, blotchy coloring, and bad airbrush attempts. Add terrible shading that looks like it was done with the spray can tool in MS Paint, with harsh edges and color bleeding. Dress her in a poorly drawn version of the reference outfit using blocky shapes, wrong perspective, and mismatched colors. The hands and fingers must look broken and deformed, with extra or missing fingers. Pose her in a similar position to the reference but make the anatomy completely wrong — shoulders at odd angles, neck too long or too short, head floating unnaturally. Emphasize the low-quality pixel-by-pixel feel with visible compression artifacts, dithering, and 1990s Windows 95 aesthetic. The overall drawing should be vaguely similar to the reference but also not really — kind of matching but off in a confusing, awkward, and hilarious way. Proportions should be ridiculous, symmetry completely broken, colors oversaturated or completely wrong in places. Include random MS Paint artifacts like leftover selection marquees, thick black outlines that don’t match, and clumsy fill bucket overflows. The background must be completely white with no extra elements except maybe a few accidental scribbles or stray pixels. Make it look like a child or a very unskilled adult spent 10 minutes struggling in MS Paint. Prioritize maximum pathetic quality — the worse it looks, the better. Exaggerate every flaw while still keeping the core identity of the exact face from the reference image recognizable but hilariously distorted. Photorealistic accuracy is forbidden. Only crude, low-resolution, mouse-drawn MS Paint style is allowed. Maximum chaos, maximum awkwardness, maximum comedy in the terrible execution.

prompts.title: PS1 Retro Gaming Style Prompt
prompts.prompt: Transform the entire image into an authentic screenshot captured directly from a {argument name="console era" default="late-1990s PlayStation 1 (PS1)"} video game running on original hardware. Re-render every single element of the scene — every object, character, surface, background, lighting, and detail — as {argument name="geometry style" default="low-polygon 3D models"} with clearly visible triangular facets, flat angular geometry, and no smoothing or subdivision whatsoever. Use extremely low-resolution textures (256×256 pixels or smaller) that are blurry, pixelated, and heavily compressed, with obvious tiling seams, mipmapping artifacts, and poor UV mapping. Apply classic PS1 affine texture mapping across all surfaces so textures visibly stretch, warp, wobble, and distort unnaturally with any change in perspective or camera angle (especially noticeable on floors, walls, and curved objects). Remove all anti-aliasing entirely — every edge must be sharply jagged and aliased with prominent stair-stepping. Use only basic flat shading or simple Gouraud vertex shading with no dynamic lights, no real-time shadows, no specular highlights, and no advanced effects. Simulate the PS1’s 16-bit color depth and 5-5-5 RGB limitations by introducing visible checkerboard or ordered dithering patterns in all color gradients, skies, shadows, and semi-transparent areas to prevent banding. Include typical PS1 graphical quirks: subtle vertex snapping/jitter/wobbling on moving or angled geometry, minor polygon pop-in or Z-fighting where appropriate, and a limited draw distance that may softly fade into a low-detail fog. The overall resolution should feel like a raw {argument name="resolution" default="320×240"} or 640×480 PS1 framebuffer output, giving the whole image a slightly soft yet crunchy retro pixel look when viewed at modern sizes. Preserve the original scene composition and camera angle exactly, but convert everything into this pure PS1 3D style as if the photo itself were modeled and rendered inside an actual PS1 game. No text overlays, no HUD elements, no subtitles, no menu graphics, no scanlines, no CRT curvature, and no modern post-processing of any kind — just a clean, direct screenshot from the console’s video output.

prompts.title: Personalized Fashion Identity Character Board

I want this to feel deeply personal and psychologically accurate, like a stylist and personality analyst designed my visual identity. The goal is to show how I would carry myself in real life and what my signature presence would look like. IMPORTANT: This should NOT look like a random Pinterest aesthetic photoshoot or generic moodboard. It should feel like “this is MY signature look” — something memorable and cohesive. Include a full-body character design (head-to-toe visible) showing: Signature outfit style {argument name="outfit style" default="Dress"} Shoes/heels and why they fit my vibe Accessories (jewelry, bag, watch, rings, perfume vibe) Hairstyle (texture, length, styling, why it suits me) Makeup style (minimal but defining features) Color palette that matches my aura/personality Posture/body language/facial expression showing how I carry myself Overall energy/aura people feel around me Add very minimal text only (clean, elegant, aesthetic — not cluttered). Small labels explaining WHY each choice fits my personality in 1–2 lines max. prompts.title: Human Anatomy Educational Infographic
prompts.prompt: This combination infographic, based on images of the {argument name="subjects" default="human heart and brain"}, provides a comparative and complementary look at the body’s most vital organs. Following a consistent and clean illustrative style with detailed callouts and key summary cards, it presents a comprehensive "Human Anatomy: Heart and Brain" profile. The central section features a detailed internal cross-section of the heart on the left and a detailed, regionalized map of the brain (Frontal, Parietal, Temporal, and Occipital lobes) on the right. Below the heart, the "Cardiac Cycle" and "Blood Flow Path" diagrams are presented. To the left, a vertical sequence detailing the brain’s "Frontal Lobe," "Temporal Lobe," and "Cerebellum" (with descriptions of functions like memory, motor control, and reasoning) matches the structure of the cardiac information. Above the brain diagram, a revised "Key Regions & Functions" list replaces the chambers and valves, and below it, a revised "Top 5 Brain Functions" list includesCognition & Thinking, Sensory Processing, and Emotion Regulation. Both columns share common "Optimization Tips," "Risks & Warnings" (tailored to each organ's respective risks, such as cardiovascular disease vs. neurodegenerative disease), and "Quick Summary Cards," highlighting the heart as the body's pump and the brain as its control center, emphasizing their integrated nature and critical roles. The entire layout is structured to facilitate a direct side-by-side analysis, making it an exhaustive and cohesive educational tool.

prompts.title: Mediterranean Summer Lifestyle Portrait
prompts.prompt: A medium waist-up framing captures a confident adult male in mid-stride, his chest facing the camera while his head turns 45 degrees to gaze sharply off-camera to the right. He has a warm tan, bronzed complexion and a meticulously groomed, full, dense dark beard. His dark brown to black hair features a crisp high skin fade on the sides and back, blending into one and a half to two inches of length on top that is styled upward and slightly forward with a textured, matte-finish product, displaying natural thickness and slight, non-uniform variations in strand direction alongside a sharp temple line-up. His serious, guarded expression is accentuated by a closed neutral mouth and dark charcoal sunglasses that completely obscure his eyes. He wears a light cornflower blue button-down shirt paired with cream linen trousers. His left hand rests casually downward by his side with fingers naturally curled, adorned with a thin gold chain bracelet on the wrist and a gold ring on his pinky. His right hand is raised to shoulder height, where the index finger gently hooks over the collar of a light cream linen jacket slung over his slightly raised right shoulder, the thumb and remaining fingers pinching the fabric securely. He stands positioned slightly to the right of center in an outdoor Mediterranean setting, balanced by the negative space of a weathered, center-left midground stone archway. This traditional Apulian Trullo entrance is constructed from rough-hewn raw cut limestone and tufa blocks, featuring unfinished dry-stone masonry with deep crevices, irregular chipped edges, aged pitting, and a matte off-white and cream finish with subtle beige and gray undertones, framing a deep black void inside. In the background at the top right, a weathered conical stepped stone roof rises, while a few blurred thriving olive green leaves drop down into the top left edge of the foreground. A sun-drenched, warm Mediterranean afternoon bathes the scene in bright, soft natural sunlight with strong environmental bounce from the front-left, illuminating the subject's right side with a warm golden glow. Soft, gradual shadows fall under his right arm, along the left side of his face and neck, and deep within the stone archway, while preserved specular highlights accent his right cheek, nose, the upper chest of his blue shirt, and the sunlit edges of the textured stone. The split-complementary palette creates a sophisticated mood of relaxed, polished masculinity. Captured straight on at eye level using digital photography with a 50mm or 85mm lens at an aperture of f/4.0 to f/5.6, the shot features a medium depth of field that keeps the subject tack sharp while allowing the background architecture to become slightly softer at the extreme edges. Post-processing includes a gentle contrast curve, targeted sharpening on the hair, beard, and masonry, and color grading that enhances the warm golden hour tones to beautifully contrast the cool blue shirt against the warm stone and skin, all seamlessly framed in a 4:5 aspect ratio.

prompts.title: Nighttime Marina Fashion Portrait
prompts.prompt: A confident {argument name="subject" default="young adult male"} stands facing the camera in a posed, sophisticated portrait, his weight leaning slightly to the left with level shoulders. He has a dense, dark brown-black neatly trimmed box beard and a modern haircut with tapered sides and a {argument name="hairstyle" default="two-to-three-inch textured quiff"} pushed upward and mostly swept forward. The naturally straight hair features a slightly off-center right part and is styled with a matte paste to create volume and separation without shine, distinctly showing natural imperfections like slight frizz on the extreme edges, minor flyaways, and unequal clumping. His expression is self-assured with a neutral mouth, direct gaze, and relaxed eyebrows. He wears a short-sleeve pitch-black polo shirt and charcoal grey trousers. His left hand rests lightly on a slanted, pristine polished tubular steel boat railing in the foreground, revealing a leather-strap watch. His right hand is in his pocket. This is a layered scene, leading into a deep, thriving marina midground where the pitch-black water forms fluid ripples that intensely reflect bright golden-yellow and white city lights. To the right, a massive curved high-rise building glows with warm golden interior lights across dense horizontal balconies, balancing the asymmetric composition. On the left, a brightly lit passenger boat moves across the water channel, backed by a background cluster of tall, rectangular dark glass skyscrapers exhibiting vertical lines, cooler cyan architectural accents, and rooftop construction lighting against the deep night sky. The energetic, cosmopolitan atmosphere features a highly saturated, warm, and high-contrast complementary color profile heavily emphasizing pitch black, warm gold, charcoal grey, and neon blue. A bright, soft, and continuous frontal fill light illuminates the subject, leaving soft, gradual gray shadows under his chin, behind his trouser folds, and beneath the railing, while preserved specular highlights glisten on his forehead, nose tip, arms, the metallic railing, and the water surface. Captured as realistic digital photography with a straight-on perspective, the image channels low-light smartphone portraiture aesthetics, featuring slightly soft sharpness, characteristic digital noise, a deep depth of field, and post-processing that boosts city light saturation and applies a high-contrast curve, all smoothly framed in a 3:4 aspect ratio.

prompts.title: Cinematic Neo-Noir Identity Reference

The artwork appears handcrafted with charcoal and pencil strokes blended with subtle painterly realism, softly illuminated by a warm hanging lamp above it. The man stares intensely at the portrait as if lost in memories. His posture conveys silent love, longing, and nostalgia. He holds a slowly burning cigarette in his right hand, with delicate smoke rising upward and blending into the atmospheric haze and neon light. Piplup is depicted with highly expressive, cute, and sometimes comical expressions. ​The image is a collage of multiple wholesome and motivational scenes scattered across the canvas, accompanied by handwritten-style text captions. The scenes include: the duo hugging tightly with the text "Dream big. Work hard. Make it real."; studying together at a desk with a stack of books; working out with a dumbbell where Piplup wears a headband; swimming together happily; going on a grocery run with Piplup sitting in the shopping cart; the man playfully scolding Piplup for eating the last snack; gaming together with a controller; napping soundly on a couch; cooking in the kitchen as a chef and sous chef; wearing matching sunglasses in a "silly mode" pose; jogging together in a park; and the man working intensely on a laptop. ​The bottom features a collection of small "Piplup Moods" showing different cute facial expressions, alongside a touching closing message that reads, "Through every battle, every win, and every failure... you're always by my side. Thank you, Piplup. WE DON'T JUST CHASE DREAMS, WE MAKE THEM HAPPEN." The overall art style is sketchy yet polished, with warm, soft coloring and an inspiring, uplifting atmosphere focused on friendship, discipline, and partnership.

prompts.title: Neo-Constructivist Typographic Brand Poster
prompts.prompt: A bold Neo-Constructivist typographic brand advertisement poster for “{argument name="brand name" default="BRAND NAME"}”. The composition is a full-bleed, portrait-format graphic design piece that fuses extreme typographic-as-architecture with 2 to 3 iconic hero products of {argument name="brand name" default="BRAND NAME"} embedded directly into the layout. The letters of “{argument name="brand name" default="BRAND NAME"}” are massively oversized, fragmented, and cropped at the edges of the frame, functioning as giant abstract geometric building blocks. The letterforms are modular, maze-like, and interlocking — constructed from rounded rectangles, angular channels, and tight negative-space gaps. The entire composition is a strict grid-structured layout divided into rectangular zones. HERO PRODUCTS: 2 to 3 of {argument name="brand name" default="BRAND NAME"}’s most iconic, recognizable products are placed within dedicated rectangular grid zones inside the composition. The products are rendered in a flat, high-contrast, graphic illustration style — NOT photographic. They are silhouetted, simplified into bold flat shapes, and colored using only the brand’s official color palette. The products sit inside clearly defined rectangular or square cells within the grid, framed by the surrounding typographic mass. Each product occupies its own zone — one product per cell — with clean hard edges. The products feel architectural and structural, as if they are part of the typographic grid itself, not floating decorations. Examples: for Nike — a side-profile Air Max sneaker silhouette, a jersey, and a sports bag; for Coca-Cola — a glass bottle, a can, and a glass with ice; for Apple — an iPhone, MacBook, and AirPods; for McDonald’s — a burger, fries box, and a drink cup. The products are rendered WITHOUT any background within their cell — just a flat solid brand color fill behind each product silhouette, so they integrate cleanly into the poster’s color system. Product details are reduced to essential bold outlines and flat fill areas — no gradients, no shadows, no photorealism. They should look like vintage product icons or stamp illustrations. Color palette is strictly limited to THREE colors from {argument name="brand name" default="BRAND NAME"}’s official brand identity: {argument name="primary color" default="PRIMARY COLOR"} for the dominant typographic mass and letterforms, {argument name="accent color" default="SECONDARY COLOR"} for product silhouettes and the single bold geometric accent shape (a perfect circle or bold stripe), and {argument name="background color" default="BACKGROUND COLOR"} as the deep solid background. All fills are 100% flat. No gradients, no tints, no textures on the products themselves. Somewhere along the left or right vertical edge, the brand name “{argument name="brand name" default="BRAND NAME"}” is typeset in large, bold, condensed sans-serif capital letters rotated 90 degrees in the accent color, anchoring the composition as a vertical label. At least one perfect geometric circle in the accent color appears in the upper zone of the composition as a structural element. The overall aesthetic references Soviet Constructivism (Rodchenko, El Lissitzky), 1970s Swiss Internat

prompts.title: Hyper-Real 16K Documentary Shot: The Sun Flickers Off
prompts.prompt: A hyper-real 16K documentary shot capturing the exact moment the Sun flickers—turning off for 0.2 seconds. Show real Earth daylight collapsing into instant, impossible darkness. Streetlights half-ignite in mid-boot, car headlights flare weakly, every shadow in the world disappears at the same exact millisecond, leaving a terrifying flat black nothing. In the next heartbeat, daylight detonates back on—shadows snap violently back into existence like razor-sharp cutouts. Birds freeze mid-flight as if gravity paused; cars halt as if inertia hesitated. The far horizon glows a faint, residual red, like an afterimage burned onto the sky. Use natural global lighting physics, atmospheric scattering, documentary realism, handheld news-camera vibration, micro-grain, zero CGI softness, ultra-sharp lensing, real-world color science, and scientific accuracy. Convey global panic but captured with the calm, unfiltered eye of a live news broadcast. Hyper-real, 16K, macro-cinematic documentary detail.

prompts.title: Summer Holiday Luxury Resort Fashion

The scene unfolds outdoors from a straight-on perspective on a pristine {argument name="setting" default="boat deck built of smooth white fiberglass"} that transitions into woven off-white trampoline netting with a geometric grid pattern in the foreground. In the midground, the asymmetric balance heavily favors the left with a dominant worn light blue paddleboard featuring a grey traction pad and black bungee cords strapped to the boat, offset on the right by a pristine stainless steel tubular boat chair frame with a white seat base. prompts.title: Cosmic Space Opera Dark Emperor
prompts.prompt: Cinematic space opera realism, masterpiece quality. Camera Position: high overhead bird's-eye angle, slightly tilted | Framing: looking down at the emperor and throne from above, the black hole opening directly beneath/behind the throne into infinite darkness, planetary destruction radiating outward in a circular composition. Subject: A dark emperor seated on a colossal floating throne, viewed from a high overhead angle that emphasizes his solitude and dominance against the incomprehensible scale of the black hole below. The throne floats at the exact tipping point of the event horizon — a tiny figure in absolute command of cosmic destruction. Clothing: black robes spread dramatically outward from the throne seat, dissolving into dark smoke that curls into the gravitational pull below. The robe dissolution creates a visual wing-like silhouette when seen from above, giving the emperor a dark angelic geometry. Crown: the crown's golden light projects upward toward the camera, blazing directly at the viewer — a concentrated point of warm radiance against the darkness. Throne: the massive obsidian throne becomes a centerpiece in the circular composition, its edges catching accretion disk amber light, casting long shadows outward in all directions. Background: radiating outward from the throne in a circle: shattered planets at various stages of destruction — some still partially intact with visible surface geography and cloud cover, others reduced to orbiting fragments and glowing magma trails. The black hole's accretion disk forms an enormous ring of fire that fills the extreme background, gravitational lensing creating concentric arcs of bent starlight around the void. The depth of the black hole stretches downward into absolute darkness below the throne. Primary Light: accretion disk light radiating inward from all sides — warm amber-gold casting circular light patterns on the throne and robe spread. Secondary Light: crown's golden upward blaze creating a spotlight-like cone toward the viewer. Ambient: cold blue-white starlight and gravitational lens arcs creating fine rim highlights on planet fragments. Color Grade: radial color — warm gold and amber at the edges from the accretion disk, deep cold black at the void center | crown warm gold beacon | robe smoke dark violet-black. Textures: detailed planetary surface geography on planet fragments, hyper-detailed robe fabric spread, rough throne stone surface with glinting mineral inclusions. Vibes: 2001 A Space Odyssey meets Avengers Endgame portal scene meets Lovecraftian cosmic scale — overwhelming, circular, mythological.

His left hand is tucked casually into his front left trouser pocket with the thumb resting outside against the fabric and the wrist mostly obscured, while his right hand rests flat against the side of the hood of the car to support his leaning weight, fingers lightly and naturally extended, finishing his ensemble with polished black leather derby shoes. prompts.title: Minimalist Desert Lifestyle Car Portrait
prompts.prompt: {argument name="subject" default="An adult athletic male with a short haircut and light stubble"} stands centered and straight-on, dressed entirely in a monochromatic black outfit featuring a plain long-sleeve crewneck shirt and crisp black trousers. His expression is serious and confident, characterized by a direct gaze, neutral eyebrows, and a closed mouth. He is positioned on a sandy gray-brown gravel driveway in an outdoor desert setting with deep spatial depth, structured with asymmetric balance following the rule of thirds. Dominating the immediate right foreground is the pristine side profile of a {argument name="vehicle" default="white Jeep Wrangler"} detailed with stark black door handles, side mirrors, and fender flares. Framing the left midground is a small, thriving brownish-gray spiky desert shrub, leading back to a luxurious, minimalist flat-roofed modern house. The house boasts perfectly smooth, matte off-white plaster walls, accented by warm wood paneling around the entryway and a dark garage door segmented by horizontal glass panels. The scene is bathed in a calm, soft, diffused front light from a single neutral dusk source, creating a quiet, modern desert lifestyle atmosphere. Soft, gradual gray shadows pool shortly beneath the subject and cast lightly onto the gravel behind him, while perfectly preserved specular highlights touch his forehead, the bridge of his nose, and dance subtly as reflections along the car body. The color palette is high-contrast yet beautifully balances the deep black of the subject's clothing against the off-white architecture, the pale blue twilight sky above, and the warm sand hues of the earth below. Captured as a tack-sharp digital photograph on an 85mm lens at f/4.0 and ISO 400, the medium depth of field keeps the subject and vehicle sharply focused while subtly softening the distant house. Drawing influence from contemporary luxury automotive and apparel editorial photography, the clean image features post-processing with lifted shadows to retain intricate details in the dark clothing and refined color grading that accentuates the cool twilight blues and warm grounded sand tones, all seamlessly framed in a 4:5 aspect ratio.

prompts.title: Cosmic Emperor Black Hole Throne
prompts.prompt: Cinematic space opera realism, masterpiece quality. Camera Position: high overhead bird's-eye angle, slightly tilted | Framing: looking down at the {argument name="subject" default="emperor"} and throne from above, the {argument name="background" default="black hole"} opening directly beneath/behind the throne into infinite darkness, planetary destruction radiating outward in a circular composition. Subject: A dark emperor seated on a colossal floating throne, viewed from a high overhead angle that emphasizes his solitude and dominance against the incomprehensible scale of the black hole below. The throne floats at the exact tipping point of the event horizon — a tiny figure in absolute command of cosmic destruction. Clothing: black robes spread dramatically outward from the throne seat, dissolving into dark smoke that curls into the gravitational pull below. The robe dissolution creates a visual wing-like silhouette when seen from above, giving the emperor a dark angelic geometry. Crown: the crown's golden light projects upward toward the camera, blazing directly at the viewer — a concentrated point of warm radiance against the darkness. Throne: the massive obsidian throne becomes a centerpiece in the circular composition, its edges catching accretion disk {argument name="lighting" default="amber"} light, casting long shadows outward in all directions. Background: radiating outward from the throne in a circle: shattered planets at various stages of destruction — some still partially intact with visible surface geography and cloud cover, others reduced to orbiting fragments and glowing magma trails. The black hole's accretion disk forms an enormous ring of fire that fills the extreme background, gravitational lensing creating concentric arcs of bent starlight around the void. The depth of the black hole stretches downward into absolute darkness below the throne. Primary Light: accretion disk light radiating inward from all sides — warm amber-gold casting circular light patterns on the throne and robe spread. Secondary Light: crown's golden upward blaze creating a spotlight-like cone toward the viewer. Ambient: cold blue-white starlight and gravitational lens arcs creating fine rim highlights on planet fragments. Color Grade: radial color — warm gold and amber at the edges from the accretion disk, deep cold black at the void center | crown warm gold beacon | robe smoke dark violet-black. Textures: detailed planetary surface geography on planet fragments, hyper-detailed robe fabric spread, rough throne stone surface with glinting mineral inclusions. Vibes: 2001 A Space Odyssey meets Avengers Endgame portal scene meets Lovecraftian cosmic scale — overwhelming, circular, mythological.

prompts.title: Urban Waterfront Male Portrait
prompts.prompt: A candid, serious profile shot of a {argument name="subject" default="male subject"} leaning casually into the left side of the frame, his relaxed posture supported by shoulders angled naturally. His hair is meticulously styled with three to four inches on top blending into a sharp tapered fade on the sides and back, held in place by a medium-hold pomade that catches subtle highlights along natural comb lines, while a few slight, organic flyaways escape at the crown. He is dressed in a {argument name="clothing" default="black long-sleeve knit shirt and cream trousers"}, his face partially shielded by translucent-frame sunglasses as he gazes away with a neutral, relaxed expression. His left hand rests organically on the top edge of a glass railing with the wrist slightly bent, while his right hand rests comfortably beside it with gently curled fingers adorned by a gold link bracelet and two gold rings. He leans against a pristine, warm gray matte concrete walkway ledge dotted with thriving, manicured green shrubs, observing the deep spatial expanse of the scene before him. In the pristine teal-blue midground waterway, a moving speedboat carves a white wake beneath a red and white flag, passing an anchored, weathered traditional brown wooden dhow with white trim on the right. The background rises majestically into a dominant {argument name="building" default="red terracotta high-rise building"} characterized by distinctive tiered architecture and geometric windows, flanked by various sand-colored resort structures. The serene and contemplative urban evening is bathed in soft, diffused, single-source light cascading neutrally from above, casting short, soft-edged gray shadows gently beneath his jawline and arms while catching delicate highlights on the sheen of his hair product, sunglass frames, and the rippling water below. The cool, moderately saturated split-complementary color palette beautifully contrasts the deep black of his knitwear against the sweeping teal water, warm terracotta skyline, and warm beige accents. Captured straight-on via crisp digital photography using a 50mm lens at f/4.0, ISO 400, and a 1/250s shutter speed to achieve a medium depth of field and tack-sharp focus with a whisper of realistic digital noise, the image is refined by a modern luxury lifestyle aesthetic featuring subtle teal and orange color grading, gently lifted shadows, and clean natural skin retouching, all framed in a 9:16 aspect ratio.

prompts.title: Mediterranean Historic Site Male Portrait
prompts.prompt: A handsome male in his {argument name="age" default="mid-30s"} with an athletic build stands in a confident, deliberately posed stance, his direct gaze meeting the lens with a sophisticated, neutral expression. His {argument name="hair description" default="medium-length, wavy brown hair"} is pushed back, revealing natural texture and subtle strands caught in the sun. He is dressed in casual elegance, wearing {argument name="outfit" default="a fitted, dark charcoal grey button-down shirt with rolled-up sleeves, sharply tailored bright white trousers, and tan suede slip-on loafers"}. His body is gently angled, weight resting comfortably to the left as his right shoulder leans against a massive stone structure, with one leg casually crossed over the other at the ankle. Both hands are relaxed in front of his waist, loosely clasping the left and right sides of a pair of dark sunglasses, with his fingers lightly gripping the frame. He is anchored in an ancient Mediterranean historical site, specifically leaning against a dominant, highly weathered square pillar in the left foreground constructed of large, irregular, porous grey stone blocks complete with deeply pitted surfaces and visible rough masonry joints. The mid-level spatial depth reveals an earthy tan and brown floor of irregular cobblestones and flat stone slabs. To the right midground sits a worn, rectangular cut-stone block bench with subtle panel details, and just behind it, a classic aged stone archway frames a brightly sunlit, heavily textured interior wall crafted from raw stone and plaster. The scene is bathed in hard, highly directional natural sunlight cascading from the front-left and slightly elevated, creating a warm, energetic, and sun-drenched atmosphere. This intense, golden single-source light sculpts high-contrast, harsh-edged, deep black shadows, deliberately casting the man's silhouette directly onto the rough stone pillar behind his right side and across the cobblestone ground. Bright, preserved highlights strike his left cheek, his left shoulder, the crisp folds of his white trousers, and the vivid ochre and yellow-orange textured earth of the distant arched wall, establishing a split-complementary palette that beautifully contrasts the cool stone greys with warm, vibrant accents. Captured as a photorealistic, tack-sharp digital editorial travel lifestyle portrait using a 50mm lens with a deep depth of field, ensuring both the subject and the architectural background remain perfectly in focus. The aesthetic features a high contrast curve to emphasize the dramatic interplay of hard light and deep shadow, along with a saturation boost on the warm golden and ochre tones to create distinct color separation and emphasize the raw, porous textures of the masonry and clothing fabrics, all perfectly framed in a 4:5 aspect ratio.

prompts.title: Floating Miniature Diorama Prompt
prompts.prompt: SCENE: A trading settlement built around a large stone bridge crossing a deep river gorge with shops, storage sheds, and stairways leading to dock platforms below. Tiny traders move goods while birds glide along canyon walls. STYLE: Create a premium stylized miniature diorama where canyon terrain and river water form a continuous sculpted base integrated with market structures. The entire diorama floats in mid-air inside a blank single-color background environment that contrasts with the rocky terrain. Use stylized resin water, compact shops, and rope docks. Include miniature traders, carts, birds, barrels, crates, and rope details to reinforce handcrafted miniature storytelling scale. Lock the render to 4:3. LIGHTING: The scene occurs in late evening after sunset with very low natural light. Ambient lighting remains dim while lanterns, shop lights, and small lamps illuminate the bridge and market stalls. These lights create warm glowing pockets of illumination across the trading post while surrounding canyon surfaces remain darker, producing strong contrast and dramatic miniature depth. CAMERA: Use an isometric camera capturing the entire floating diorama clearly from top to bottom and side to side.

prompts.title: Vibrant Flat Illustration Pattern of Flowers and Shapes

prompts.title: Gallery-Quality Tribute Poster with Textured Photo Mosaic Silhouette
prompts.prompt: Create a refined, gallery-quality tribute poster built around a central portrait silhouette filled with a textured photo mosaic. The design should feel tactile, layered, and premium not like flat digital collage work. Central Structure : The Vessel The central focus must be a large-scale, high-contrast black and white portrait silhouette of {argument name="person's name" default="[Persons name]"}. This silhouette acts as the container for the internal visual narrative. It must be centered perfectly on the canvas. The Grid Fill and Mixed Media Textures The interior of the silhouette should be populated by a dense photo mosaic grid made from action shots throughout the person’s career. Critical Texture Direction Do not paste flat photos. Each grid cell should have artistic treatment to create a tactile, collage-like aesthetic. Incorporate a mix of the following textures selectively across different cells: Halftone dots (comic-book style raster patterns) Fabric or embroidery textures suggesting jersey material or stitched patches Film grain or heavy noise on high-contrast action shots The result should feel handcrafted and layered rather than digitally assembled. Color Strategy Base palette: monochrome black and white. Introduce selective color overlays only on specific grid cells. The accent colors should relate to the relevant team, brand, or national flag. Use color sparingly to create visual rhythm and emphasis. Typography and Branding – Strict Micro-Scaling Top Left (The name) Write “{argument name="person's name" default="[person name]"}” using the font Inter Semibold. Kerning: tight negative kerning , Size: small and discreet. The name must occupy a maximum of 20% of the total canvas width. Do not make it large or dominant. Top Right (The symbol) Place the primary logo (Team, Brand, or Flag). Size: very small. It must occupy a maximum of 10% of the total canvas width. Composition and Background Background Use off-white or light grey. Include a visible high-quality paper or subtle concrete texture. Avoid flat digital white. Alignment Center the silhouette precisely. Maintain generous negative space around the figure to preserve elegance and balance.

prompts.title: Dark Luxury Fallen Angel Editorial
prompts.prompt: Ultra-photorealistic 2x2 luxury glossy editorial collage featuring the same woman across all four panels, with strict identity consistency, strict body consistency, the same skin tone, the same proportions, and the same elegant posture language in every frame. CONCEPT: A dark luxury fashion editorial centered on sculptural back lines, shoulders, neck, arms, and an open-back deep red dress, with a mysterious fallen-angel aura. The mood is sensual, elegant, expensive, cinematic, controlled, and minimal. The overall feeling should be high-fashion editorial, refined and dramatic, never cheap or costume-like. SUBJECT: A beautiful woman with long loose black hair, consistent identity across all four panels. Hair is sleek yet softly textured, flowing naturally down the back and shoulders. Makeup is dark smoky eye makeup with softly diffused black shadow, defined brows, and a polished editorial finish. Nails are glossy deep red or black-cherry, long and elegant. Expression and body language are poised, feminine, and powerful. OUTFIT: Deep crimson / burgundy / blood-red velvet or satin halter dress with an open back, realistic glossy fabric highlights, natural draping, subtle tension around the waist and hips, and elegant luxury construction. The dress must look premium and believable, with no fabric glitches. The red should feel rich, dark, and sophisticated, not bright or cheap. WINGS: Large dark red angel wings behind the woman, dramatic and elegant, slightly torn and weathered for a fallen-angel feeling. The wings should feel sculptural and luxurious, not fantasy cosplay. Feather texture should be rich, layered, deep burgundy to oxblood red, with softly darkened damaged edges. The wings must integrate beautifully with the poses and lighting without overpowering the fashion editorial tone. SKIN: Glossy editorial wet-skin finish with a subtle oil sheen on the shoulders, upper back, neck, arms, and along the spine line. Real skin texture must remain visible, including pores, natural tonal variation, and realistic highlights. No plastic smoothing. The sheen should look expensive, controlled, and believable, not sweaty or messy. ENVIRONMENT: Minimal studio background with a warm grey, taupe, or soft beige seamless backdrop. No props, no distractions, no clutter. LIGHTING: Premium glossy studio lighting: - large softbox key light from the upper side - narrow rim light tracing the shoulders, spine, and wing edges - soft warm highlights on skin and fabric - deep but clean shadows - smooth gradient falloff - high-end editorial contrast - no harsh flash - no fake glow GRID 2x2: TOP LEFT: Back-facing pose, arms raised above the head, hands resting in the hair. Spine line, shoulder blades, and upper wing structure are emphasized with glossy highlights. Black hair falls naturally over part of the back while the open-back red dress and wings remain clearly visible. TOP RIGHT: Slight torso twist, one shoulder closer to the camera, head turned subtly away. The red dress catches light along one side, and the dark red angel wings frame the silhouette elegantly. Strong emphasis on shoulder, waist, and back contour. BOTTOM LEFT: Closer crop on the upper back, neck, shoulders, hands, and partial wing texture. Focus on wet-skin texture, glossy nails, smoky makeup details near the eye area if visible, and luxury detail in the red dress fabric. BOTTOM RIGHT: Elegant half-turn pose from behind, body rotated slightly, side profile subtly hinted but face mostly hidden. Strong glossy rim light on the shoulder, waist curve, and the edge of the dark red wings. The silhouette should feel sleek, mysterious, and powerful. CAMERA: Medium format fashion photography look, 85mm or 100mm lens, f/2.0, ISO 100, shallow depth of field, ultra-sharp focus on skin texture, hair texture, feather detail, and fabric finish, ultra high resolution, luxury editorial quality. COLOR GRADE: Deep burgundy, oxblood, crimson, and soft warm neutrals, with subtle champagne skin highlights and elegant shadow contrast. Fine film grain. Rich dark editorial tonality. No oversaturation. REALISM RULES: Anatomically correct back, shoulders, arms, hands, neck, and spine curve. Realistic skin sheen. Realistic red dress tension and drape. Realistic feather texture and wing anatomy. No exaggerated body proportions. No fantasy illustration look. Keep everything photorealistic and luxury editorial. NEGATIVE PROMPT: plastic skin, over-smoothed skin, fake oil, fake glow, sweaty messy look, harsh flash, distorted spine, bad anatomy, extra fingers, warped hands, broken shoulders, unrealistic wings, cheap costume wings, fake feathers, fabric glitches, unrealistic dress, altered body proportions, cartoon, anime, illustration, text, watermark, logo, oversharpening, AI artifacts

The sides of the box must contain functional doors and windows, with the front-facing side featuring a wide open doorway and visible windows. No side of the box may be removed, cut away, or missing. Exterior ornamentation must continue logically into interior architecture. Doors and windows must be precisely cut into the box sides following decorative carving patterns. Include believable miniature structural joins where beams meet the container walls. Include ultra-fine theme-specific props such as PROP_LIST. Include floating dust, micro-surface wear, tactile handcrafted realism, and environmental storytelling details. prompts.title: Asimov Visionary Split-Scene Concept Art Prompt
prompts.prompt: Do this for Asimov: 1. The Analysis: Analyze Input: Identify the Visionary's Era (e.g., 1950s) and their Core Predictions (e.g., Robotics, AI). Left Side (The Origin): Construct the room based on the actual historical workspace of the person (e.g., Typewriters, cigarette smoke, blueprints, tungsten light). Right Side (The Legacy): Construct the room based on the modern realization of their ideas (e.g., Clean server room, holograms, advanced prosthetics, cool LED light). 2. Composition (The Rift): The Divide: A diagonal beam of light splits the room. The Subject: The Visionary stands dead center. Left Half of Body: Dressed in period clothing, holding a pen/paper. Right Half of Body: Fading into digital pixels or observing a floating hologram of their invention. The Wall: Left Wall: Covered in pinned sketches and paper notes. Right Wall: A floor-to-ceiling window looking out onto a futuristic city (The world they predicted). 3. Visual Cohesion: The perspective lines of the room must match perfectly across the split. A wooden desk on the left might morph into a sleek glass interface on the right. Lighting: Warm/Dusty (Left) vs. Cold/Sterile (Right). Output: ONE image, 16:9 Aspect Ratio, Cinematic Concept Art, Photorealistic.

prompts.title: Samurai Sniper Dynamic Battle Scene Prompt
prompts.prompt: Masterpiece quality, theatrical anime-scale dynamic battle scene. A samurai character is the main subject (preserving a traditional samurai feel, optionally blended with subtle modern gear elements). Prone firing pose (low-profile/propped close to the roof surface), body flattened to the tiles, elbows braced for stability. Cheek pressed to the stock while peering through the scope, one eye narrowed, an intense focused stare and clenched teeth conveying tension and determination. Composition and angle: the camera is placed almost on the roof tiles—an extreme ground-level ultra low-angle. Wide-angle lens with exaggerated perspective and strong depth. A diagonal composition: the sniper rifle runs from the extreme lower foreground into the midground, leading the viewer’s eye directly to the samurai’s gaze. The muzzle and muzzle flash dominate the extreme foreground, appearing oversized and close enough to “break the screen,” while the face (especially the eyes) stays crisp and sharp. Action: captured at the exact instant of firing. A large, stylized muzzle flash erupts in the foreground; sparks, glowing embers, and thin smoke burst outward. Ejected brass and scattered casings on the tiles reinforce the sense of ongoing fire. A faint luminous streak suggests the bullet’s path slicing through the night air. Subtle recoil pushes the rifle and shoulder back; dynamic motion blur on the weapon and sleeves, while the eyes and brow remain tack-sharp. The scope glass reflects a cold blue-green sheen; metal surfaces show finely detailed reflections and crisp edge highlights. Setting: the rooftop of a white Japanese castle keep (white plaster walls), under a clear night sky. Clean moonlight creates strong rim lighting along roof ridges and the samurai’s silhouette. Traditional roof features—curved ceramic tiles, ridge lines, gables, and shachihoko ornaments—read clearly in silhouette and detail. The firing shock and weight shift chip and crack tiles; fragments and dust jump up and arc toward the camera. High-contrast cinematic lighting with a dramatic warm–cool split: warm muzzle flash versus cool moonlight. Filmic particles (dust, embers) in the air. Vertical cinematic poster composition, 9:16 aspect ratio, no text.

prompts.title: Ornate Box Diorama Master Prompt (Mughal Hall Interior)
prompts.prompt: Scene: ORNATE BOX DIORAMA — AUTO-THEME MASTER PROMPT ======================== SMART VARIABLE GUIDE THEME_LOCATION = {argument name="theme location" default="Marble Mughal Hall Interior"} AUTO RULES: • If THEME_LOCATION is filled → automatically infer: PRIMARY_ACTIVITY STAIR_TYPE CEILING_DETAILS THEME_MATERIAL_STYLE PROP_LIST THEME_LIGHT_SOURCE BASE_MATERIAL_COLOR THEME_PALETTE FOCAL_SUBJECT All inferred values must be logically consistent with THEME_LOCATION. • If THEME_LOCATION is blank → first invent a visually rich miniature environment theme, assign it to THEME_LOCATION, then automatically infer all other variables from it. • Always prioritize strong environmental storytelling, believable materials, and handcrafted miniature realism when inferring values. ======================== SUBJECT: A two-level miniature THEME_LOCATION where the ornate open box itself forms the architecture, the base container acting as the full ground floor chamber with the box walls serving directly as the structural walls. The sides of the box must contain functional doors and windows, with the front-facing side featuring a wide open doorway and visible windows. No side of the box may be removed, cut away, or missing. The box height:width:length ratio is 1:4:7 (the width four times the height). The scene features PRIMARY_ACTIVITY actively interacting with the environment. The structure must be fully integrated into the box material itself — not a room inserted inside, not a display frame, not a cutaway model. The ground floor must be constructed from the same material as the box exterior. ENVIRONMENT: The base of the ornate box forms the ground floor surface and foundation. Its interior sides transform into the architectural walls containing carved doorways and window openings seamlessly cut into the box sides and aligned with exterior ornamentation. A mezzanine or upper level is built above with structural elements attached directly to the box walls and connected via STAIR_TYPE. The inside of the open lid functions as the vaulted ceiling decorated with CEILING_DETAILS. DETAILS: Intricately carved ornate box styled according to THEME_MATERIAL_STYLE. Exterior ornamentation must continue logically into interior architecture. Doors and windows must be precisely cut into the box sides following decorative carving patterns. Include believable miniature structural joins where beams meet the container walls. Include ultra-fine theme-specific props such as PROP_LIST. Include floating dust, micro-surface wear, tactile handcrafted realism, and environmental storytelling details. STYLE: Ultra-realistic cinematic miniature diorama photography, museum-grade handcrafted realism, extreme macro detail, physically believable materials, strong architectural style integration of container and structure. LIGHTING: Primary lighting motivated by THEME_LIGHT_SOURCE combined with subtle environmental secondary lighting entering through box windows
