prompts.title: Ornate Box Diorama Prompt for Twenty Thousand Leagues Under the Sea
prompts.prompt: Variable Guide 1. OVERALL_DIORAMA_THEME = Scenes from the book Twenty Thousand leagues under the sea by Jules Verne, in the order in which they are presented in the book 2. CUPBOARD_BASE_MATERIAL = 3. CUPBOARD_LINING_MATERIAL = 4. RACK_MATERIAL = 5. ORNAMENTATION_STYLE = [e.g., Gothic carved wood, Art Deco brass, Elven interlaced vines] 6. ART_STYLE = Hyper-Realistic Render 7. TOP_SHELF_SCENE = [Describe specific actions of miniature figures defining the scene] 8. MIDDLE_SHELF_SCENE = [Describe specific actions of miniature figures defining the scene] 9. BOTTOM_SHELF_SCENE = [Describe specific actions of miniature figures defining the scene] 10. LIGHTING = 11. CAMERA_ANGLE = A straight-on, front-facing view, captured from a moderately high angle looking distinctly downward. 12. ASPECT_RATIO = 3:4 Generation Directives (Note: If any variable is left blank, intelligently infer the most appropriate detail based on the OVERALL_DIORAMA_THEME) Directive 1: Framing & Composition (Highest Priority) A direct, front-facing photograph captured from CAMERA_ANGLE. The composition must perfectly center the open display structure, looking down at a distinct angle into the shelves to clearly reveal the floor plates and top-down depth of the miniature objects within the dioramas, while ensuring the exterior side panels remain completely hidden. The entire free-standing structure must be completely visible with negative space around it against a simple background. The aspect ratio is 3:4. Directive 2: The Main Structure (Strict Constraints) Render the image in the style of ART_STYLE. The central object is a highly detailed, permanently open-front curio display structure. It must not possess doors, hinges, or door frames of any kind. The exterior is constructed from CUPBOARD_BASE_MATERIAL and detailed with ORNAMENTATION_STYLE. The interior back wall is lined with CUPBOARD_LINING_MATERIAL, and the individual shelves are made of RACK_MATERIAL. Directive 3: The Miniature Dioramas & Figures The structure houses a cohesive miniature world divided across three shelves, adhering to the OVERALL_DIORAMA_THEME. Crucially, each shelf must contain miniature figures engaged in a specific narrative action. * Top Shelf: Miniature figures are depicted [TOP_SHELF_SCENE]. * Middle Shelf: Miniature figures are depicted [MIDDLE_SHELF_SCENE]. * Bottom Shelf: Miniature figures are depicted [BOTTOM_SHELF_SCENE]. Ensure the scale clearly reads as miniature dioramas housed within a furniture piece. Directive 4: Atmosphere & Lighting The scene is illuminated by LIGHTING. The lighting should cast appropriate micro-shadows within each shelf to emphasize the depth, the figures, and the miniature scale of the dioramas.

prompts.title: Sophisticated Man in Resort Pathway
prompts.prompt: A well-groomed {argument name="subject" default="man"} with a neatly maintained beard stands directly in the center of the frame at a slight forty-five-degree angle, leaning back casually with level shoulders. He is dressed in an {argument name="outfit" default="off-white linen long-sleeve shirt"} unbuttoned at the top and matching linen trousers, shaping the loose, slightly wrinkled matte fabric by resting his relaxed left hand in his front trouser pocket, where his thumb hooks naturally over the outer seam beside a thin silver cuff bracelet. His face holds a confident, deliberately posed, subtle closed smile, with relaxed eyebrows and a direct gaze capturing the viewer's immediate attention. Following the natural lines of his relaxed posture downward, the scene transitions into a deeply layered {argument name="setting" default="outdoor resort pathway"}. In the immediate left foreground, the rough, heavily textured brown bark of a thriving palm tree trunk naturally frames the composition. A solid, smooth poured cool gray concrete walkway, bordered by manicured olive-green grass, recedes into a slightly blurred midground, beautifully illuminated by pristine, modern rectangular bollard lights resting on the ground. Behind the subject, a tightly packed vertical light wood bamboo-style slat fence provides a clean textural midground, while the right side is anchored by a pristine modern building wing featuring perfectly smooth, matte warm taupe painted drywall, sharp geometric lines, recessed windows, and a dark structural pillar. Towering in the deep background, a dominant row of thriving, dark green conical cypress trees forms a dense privacy hedge against a twilight blue sky. A serene, sophisticated twilight mood permeates this upscale setting, draped in a cool, desaturated split-complementary color palette where moody, soft diffused lighting cascades gently from above. The cool blue ambient dusk temperature washes over the scene, while the ground bollards emit a contrasting warm orange and yellow accent glow that creates subtle highlights directly along the concrete path. Soft, short, gradual gray shadows pool delicately under the man's facial features and within the natural folds of his linen garments, establishing a calm, low-contrast, and evenly filled atmospheric depth. Captured straight on as highly realistic digital photography mimicking a 50mm to 85mm lens at an aperture of f/2.8 to f/4 with a 1/125s shutter speed, the image balances tack-sharp focal clarity on the subject's face with a medium depth of field that gently softens the background. The sophisticated aesthetic is finalized with intentional post-processing that introduces visible digital noise grain, lifted blacks for a soft cinematic matte fade, slightly desaturated greens, and split toning that pushes cool blues into the shadows and warm golden hues into the practical midtone highlights, all elegantly framed in a 9:16 aspect ratio.

prompts.title: Gothic Vampire Cinematic Scene
prompts.prompt: Dark gothic alley at night, wet brick wall and rain-soaked pavement reflecting a dim street lamp. Heavy fog drifts slowly through the alley. A pale elegant vampire woman in a long black coat and dark red dress leans against the wall, motionless and mysterious. Cinematic horror lighting, dramatic shadows, shallow depth of field, ultra-realistic, 35mm film look, film grain, volumetric fog. The camera begins at her black leather boots and performs a slow cinematic vertical dolly shot upward, moving smoothly from her feet → legs → waist → shoulders → lips → eyes. Suspense builds as the camera rises. When the camera reaches her face, she slowly tilts her head and gives a cold villain smile. Her long sharp vampire fangs slide into view, fresh blood dripping slowly from the tips. Her eyes glow subtly in the darkness. She whispers softly: “Welcome to the night…” Immediately after, she lets out a quiet sinister villain laugh as the fog thickens and the lighting darkens. The scene begins to slowly fade to black, while the camera continues pushing forward into an extreme close-up, zooming closer and closer until the camera enters her mouth, ending in darkness. Style keywords: cinematic horror, gothic vampire, slow camera movement, dramatic lighting, suspenseful, photorealistic, moody atmosphere, shallow depth of field, film grain, volumetric fog.

prompts.title: Quiet Luxury Resort Aesthetic
prompts.prompt: A {argument name="subject" default="confident man in his late thirties"} stands perfectly centered, exuding a quiet luxury aesthetic. His posture is formal and straight with level shoulders and evenly distributed weight, his arms relaxed as both hands rest gracefully on his waistbands with the fingers tucked behind his back out of view. He stands on a slightly weathered {argument name="foreground" default="foreground wooden deck"}, its medium ash brown linear planks showing fine natural grain and gentle wear. The deep spatial layout expands symmetrically into the midground, where to his left sits a vintage paneled dark wood service cabinet accented with brass hardware alongside a distant patio dining setup, while the right features pristine white cylindrical columns supporting a slatted pergola roof over dark wood lounge chairs with crisp white upholstered cushions, small wooden side tables holding white pillar candles inside glass hurricanes, and a black metal railing. Behind him, the deep background reveals a pristine, slightly textured matte white stucco multi-story building facade with dark green window shutters and a clean black metal lantern sconce on the left, blending into a dense canopy of thriving dark green Mediterranean pine and cypress trees. To the far right, the view opens to a dominant, calm slate ocean meeting a hazy mountainous coastline. The scene is bathed in {argument name="lighting" default="soft, diffused golden hour lighting"} from a sunset backlight and warm ambient sky fill, casting gentle illumination from above and placing subtle highlights on his shoulders, the crown of his textured hair, and the left side of his face. Faint, soft-edged shadows pool gently under his polo collar, within the subtle folds of the knit fabric, and as a slight drop shadow on the deck below him, creating a calm, flat, low-contrast atmosphere. A desaturated, split-complementary color palette harmonizes the off-white cream of his shirt and the light blue denim against medium wood browns, slate ocean blues, and delicate sunset peach tones spanning the sky. Captured as a realistic digital photograph shot straight on with a 50mm lens at f/4.0 and a 1/200s shutter speed, the image maintains a tack-sharp, grain-free focus on the subject while employing a medium depth of field to render the sophisticated resort background slightly soft. prompts.title: Hyper-realistic cinematic conversion prompt for nano-banana-pro
prompts.prompt: Core Requirement: Convert all elements in the reference image—including characters, scenes, props, and environment—into ultra-realistic, live-action settings, resembling actual on-set movie stills. Character Conversion: Strictly retain the original character's hairstyle, clothing, expression, facial features, body movements, and overall temperament, converting them into a real actor's image. Scene Conversion: • Restore the comic/illustration scene to a real, physically shootable space • All props, furniture, and architecture must be real set construction or real location shooting • Realistic material texture: fabric folds, wood grain texture, metal reflections, wall texture • Rich environmental details: dust, signs of wear, everyday life details • Spatial perspective and light/shadow must conform to physical laws Photography Style: Cinematic live-action photography • Deep depth of field composition, with everything clear from foreground to background • Film texture, soft grain, and rich color layering • Dramatic light and shadow contrast: warm tungsten working lights vs. cool natural twilight • Subject prominence while retaining environmental narrative • Scene art and photography comparable to 'Blade Runner' or 'The Grand Budapest Hotel' Technical Specifications: • Film Stock: Kodak Vision3 500T (cinematic photography standard) • Applicable Scenes: Night scenes, low light environments, indoor tungsten lighting • Aperture: f/8–f/11 (deep depth of field, entire frame clear) • Focal Length: 35mm–50mm (standard cinematic perspective) • Resolution: 4K cinema or higher • Color: Warm, saturated tungsten color temperature, retaining detail in shadows • Lighting Design: Three-point lighting or natural light combined to create cinematic light and shadow layers Scene Art Requirements: • Real set construction or location shooting, avoiding the feel of CG synthesis • Prop placement conforms to the character's background and era setting • Spatial design with depth and a sense of life • Environmental elements like walls, floors, and ceilings must have realistic texture • Background characters (if any) must also be real actors, avoiding blurring Negative Prompts (Strictly Avoid): • Blurred background, shallow depth of field, bokeh, out-of-focus • Cartoon, anime, illustration style, hand-drawn texture, CG rendering feel • Flat composition, lack of spatial depth • Fake sets, green screen artifacts, digital backgrounds • Facial deformation, disproportionate scaling, AI generation artifacts • Low quality, digital noise, pixelation, excessive sharpening • Overexposed strong light, plastic texture, excessive digital post-processing • Floating props, physical implausibility, material texture mapping feel • Empty background, lack of detail, monotonous environment Reference Style: Masterpieces of cinematic photography - the live-action aesthetic of Roger Deakins, Emmanuel Lubezki, Hoyte van Hoytema.

prompts.title: Mech Armor Power Reveal Prompt (Likeness Preservation)
prompts.prompt: An ultra-dominant cinematic power reveal of the character fully re-engineered in advanced mech armor, preserving the exact eye shape, spacing, facial structure, patterns, and original color palette with absolute fidelity. The helmet is open, framing the face without altering proportions. Identity remains untouched. No humanization. No anatomical reinterpretation. Likeness Preservation (CRITICAL): Keep the exact eyes, exact facial geometry, exact stylization. Armor integrates around the character’s existing design language. Patterns are embedded into armor plating, not replaced. Colors remain identical, only expressed through reinforced materials and illuminated seams. Perspective: Worm’s-eye ultra-low angle shot, camera almost touching the ground beneath the character. 16–18mm wide lens. Slight 7–10 degree horizon tilt to destabilize symmetry. One armored limb closer to the lens, dominating foreground mass. Composition: The character occupies 70% vertical frame height. Helmet open. Face near upper third intersection point. One massive mech gauntlet partially cropped out of frame edge to create unsafe framing tension. Pose: Not static. Transitional power ignition. One step forward mid-weight shift. Shoulder rotation engaged. Armor plates subtly separating as internal energy surges beneath. Depth of Field Discipline: Primary focal plane locked on the eyes. Foreground mech limb slightly soft. Lower legs progressively fall into depth blur. Background collapses into volumetric haze. Lighting Structure: Hard directional back cross-light slicing through armor edges. Cold blue rim accent along shadow edge. Subtle warm internal glow leaking through mech seams. Deep shadow pockets between plating layers. Specular highlights sharp and controlled, not glossy plastic. Surface Treatment: Micro-scratches on armor. Slight burnished metal variation. Energy veins glowing beneath translucent panels. Face remains clean and consistent with original material identity. Environment: Minimal but monumental. Volumetric atmosphere. Light shafts cutting diagonally behind character. Ground plane textured but subdued, darker than subject. Emotion: Contained power. Controlled destruction. The mech is not worn. It has bonded. Negative Prompt: No redesign of eyes. No change in facial proportions. No color shift. No bulky random sci-fi accessories. No symmetrical hero pose. No flat studio lighting. Aspect Ratio: ar 4:5

prompts.title: Cinematic Paparazzi Night Portrait
prompts.prompt: A young male with a {argument name="beard style" default="textured short beard"} stands perfectly centered, facing the camera with a deliberately posed, serious expression characterized by a neutral mouth, relaxed eyebrows, and a piercing direct gaze. He is dressed in striking winter formalwear, wearing a textured dark flat cap, a {argument name="coat type" default="heavy gray wool overcoat"} over a dark vest, a stark white dress shirt, and a diagonally striped gray tie. His right hand, clad in a dark brown leather glove with specular highlights catching on the taut knuckles, grips a metallic umbrella shaft with tense, deliberate force in the lower left quadrant of the frame. The expansive black canopy of the umbrella is heavily weighted to the right side of the composition, creating an asymmetric balance against his rigid posture while shielding him from a crisp, rainy evening. The environment falls away into deep, heavily blurred spatial depth, revealing a dark gray solid concrete floor and a rich outdoor setting where a pristine, ornate streetlamp glows warmly from the top center with multiple bulbs. To the top right, a vintage classical building facade made of smooth matte plaster transitions through an aged gradient of warm terracotta and pale yellow, detailed with architectural columns and arched windows glowing softly from within. The atmosphere is dominated by a stark split-complementary palette of charcoal gray, warm amber, stark white, and deep black, entirely shaped by a highly directional, {argument name="lighting type" default="bright, cool-toned single-source hard light"} striking the subject directly from the front. This intrusive, raw flash creates dramatic, high-contrast illumination with specular highlights gleaming sharply on his forehead, the bridge of his nose, his cheeks, and the scattered rain droplets across the dark umbrella canopy. Harsh, deep black shadows with sharply defined edges are cast directly from the umbrella shaft onto his crisp white chest, from the thick overcoat lapels onto his dark vest, and fall heavily onto the unseen space behind him. Captured as a realistic digital photograph with tack-sharp focus on the subject and a shallow depth of field, the image embraces a paparazzi aesthetic and cinematic night photography influences, complete with visible digital noise and enhanced clarity on the intricate fabric textures. The straight-on composition mimics a DSLR equipped with a 50mm lens at f/2.8 and a fast shutter speed to sync with the bare-bulb on-camera flash, processed with increased contrast to emphasize the harsh flash falloff, a color grade that cools the foreground while warming the ambient background streetlights, and a slight edge-darkening vignette, all beautifully framed in a 4:5 aspect ratio.

prompts.title: Technical Infographic Template for Objects
prompts.prompt: Create a technical infographic of {argument name="object name" default="[OBJECT NAME]"} with a 45-degree isometric 3D perspective showing the device slightly tilted to reveal depth and dimension. Combine a realistic photoreal render with black ink technical annotations on pure white background. Include: Key component labels with color-coded callout boxes Internal component visibility through transparent/cutaway sections Measurements, dimensions, and precise scale markers Material callouts and quantities Color-coded arrows for function/flow: RED (power/battery), BLUE (data/connectivity), ORANGE (thermal/processor), GREEN (sensors/haptics) Simple schematics or cross-sectional diagrams where relevant Place “OBJECT NAME” title in a hand-drawn technical box (top-left corner). Style: Black linework (technical pen/architectural), sketched but precise. Object remains clearly visible. Educational museum-exhibit vibe. Clean composition, balanced negative space. Perspective: Isometric 3D angle—tilted to show depth, dimension, and internal architecture dramatically. Like a professional product teardown or engineering manual. Colors: ~10–15% accent density. Black dominant. White background. Output: 1080×1080, ultra-crisp, social-feed optimized.

prompts.title: Ornate Box Diorama of a Royal Treasury Counting Room
prompts.prompt: ORNATE BOX DIORAMA — TRI-LAYER MASTER PROMPT (HARD FRONT-RIGHT ISOMETRIC) THEME_LOCATION = Royal Treasury Counting Room BOX_VARIABLE = Silver DOOR_MATERIAL = Gold WINDOW_MATERIAL = Gold WINDOW_PANE_MATERIAL = FLOOR_MATERIAL = STAIRCASE_TYPE = Spiral STAIRCASE_MATERIAL = Silver MEZZANINE_FLOOR_MATERIAL = Silver DIORAMA_LIGHTING = ======================== LAYER 1 — PHYSICAL GEOMETRY (HIGHEST PRIORITY) The ornate antique box is a solid rigid container transformed into architecture. If BOX_VARIABLE is specified, the entire container and its carved architectural structure must be made from that material. If BOX_VARIABLE is empty, infer logically from THEME_LOCATION. The full outer shell must remain intact on all sides. No removed walls. No dollhouse cutaway. FRONT FACADE LOCK: The FRONT SIDE must contain: • exactly ONE centered door • exactly TWO windows • one window left of the door • one window right of the door Openings must be carved THROUGH the existing wall. Apply DOOR_MATERIAL / WINDOW_MATERIAL / WINDOW_PANE_MATERIAL if specified, otherwise infer logically. Front wall must remain structurally thick and complete. ORNAMENTAL DEPTH CONTINUITY LOCK: All carvings must continue through wall thickness. Frames must appear carved from the same solid material. Interior walls share identical structural thickness. The lid must match base width and length and be hinge-connected. ======================== LAYER 2 — SCENE LOGIC Create a two-level miniature THEME_LOCATION fully integrated into the container. Use FLOOR_MATERIAL / STAIRCASE_TYPE / STAIRCASE_MATERIAL / MEZZANINE_FLOOR_MATERIAL if specified, otherwise infer logically. Upper level attaches directly to container walls. The inside of the lid functions as the vaulted ceiling. All props, materials, and architecture must match THEME_LOCATION. ======================== LAYER 3 — RENDER & CAMERA Ultra-realistic cinematic miniature diorama photography. Use DIORAMA_LIGHTING if specified. ======================== HARD FRONT-RIGHT ISOMETRIC CAMERA SYSTEM CORNER ANCHOR RULE: The FRONT-RIGHT TOP CORNER of the box must be the closest point to the viewer. WALL VISIBILITY RATIO RULE: The front wall must occupy slightly more visible area than the right wall. Approximate visual dominance: • front wall ≈ 60% visibility • right wall ≈ 40% visibility Both must be clearly visible simultaneously. RIM OCCLUSION RULE: Camera must remain above the front wall rim. The top edge of the front wall must overlap a small portion of the interior floor. Interior must be seen OVER the wall, never through a missing wall. FORBIDDEN CAMERA POSITIONS: Do NOT center the camera on the front wall. Do NOT use a straight frontal view. Do NOT use a top-down view. Do NOT prioritize interior visibility over box geometry. COMPOSITION TARGET: The image must resemble a professionally photographed miniature collectible box viewed from a stable elevated front

prompts.title: Anime Crossover Warriors Illustration

prompts.title: Luxury Resort Male Editorial Portrait
prompts.prompt: {argument name="subject" default="A young adult male with an athletic build and naturally textured two-inch dark curly hair"} stands with his weight casually shifted, facing the camera straight on in a sophisticated luxury editorial portrait. His serious, contemplative face features relaxed eyebrows and eyes gazing off to the left, drawing the viewer's eye down to the crisp {argument name="top" default="white collar of his dark navy blue polo shirt"}. He wears warm khaki trousers secured by a brown leather belt; his right hand rests deliberately on his waist with the thumb casually hooked over the leather and fingers draped softly against the fabric, while his relaxed left hand, adorned with a silver watch and accented by a gold ring and bracelet, drops casually to his side, partially cropped by the bottom edge of the frame. He is positioned right-center in an asymmetric composition, grounding the foreground before a {argument name="setting" default="deep, pristine outdoor luxury resort setting"}. Just behind him in the midground, a serene infinity pool features a solid gray-beige concrete underwater step and a perfectly calm surface that ripples gently, mirroring the twilight sky. Stretching into the deep background, the expansive space reveals a single, tall palm tree silhouetted on the left beside low-profile modern resort architecture accented by lush tropical foliage and warm glowing lights, while a rugged rocky coastal outcrop on the right slopes gracefully toward the distant ocean horizon. A calm, old-money atmospheric mood is established by the twilight evening, illuminated by a single, diffused setting sun from the front-left that casts a golden, warm light. This soft illumination perfectly preserves the highlights on the left side of his face, nose bridge, and left forearm, while creating short, soft-edged, gradual gray shadows across the right side of his face, neck, and right arm, gently lifted by an ambient white bounce fill. The split-complementary color palette richly contrasts the dark navy and khaki of his clothing against the soft teal-green water and the muted peach and gray gradient of the open sky. Captured as a tack-sharp realistic digital photograph on a full-frame mirrorless camera with a 50mm lens and an f/2.8 aperture at 1/200s and ISO 400, the medium depth of field keeps the subject distinctly crisp while smoothly blurring the deep background. Post-processing introduces a hint of cinematic digital noise and a subtle teal-and-peach color grading that lifts shadows for a softer film-like contrast while protecting the sky's gradient, all perfectly framed in a 4:5 aspect ratio.

prompts.title: Upscale Resort Pathway Male Portrait
prompts.prompt: A well-groomed man with a neatly maintained beard stands directly in the center of the frame at a slight forty-five-degree angle, leaning back casually with level shoulders. He is dressed in an {argument name="outfit" default="off-white linen long-sleeve shirt"} unbuttoned at the top and matching linen trousers, shaping the loose, slightly wrinkled matte fabric by resting his relaxed left hand in his front trouser pocket, where his thumb hooks naturally over the outer seam beside a thin silver cuff bracelet. His face holds a confident, deliberately posed, subtle closed smile, with relaxed eyebrows and a direct gaze capturing the viewer's immediate attention. Following the natural lines of his relaxed posture downward, the scene transitions into a deeply layered {argument name="setting" default="outdoor resort pathway"}. In the immediate left foreground, the rough, heavily textured brown bark of a thriving palm tree trunk naturally frames the composition. A solid, smooth poured cool gray concrete walkway, bordered by manicured olive-green grass, recedes into a slightly blurred midground, beautifully illuminated by pristine, modern rectangular bollard lights resting on the ground. Behind the subject, a tightly packed vertical light wood bamboo-style slat fence provides a clean textural midground, while the right side is anchored by a pristine modern building wing featuring perfectly smooth, matte warm taupe painted drywall, sharp geometric lines, recessed windows, and a dark structural pillar. Towering in the deep background, a dominant row of thriving, dark green conical cypress trees forms a dense privacy hedge against a twilight blue sky. A serene, sophisticated twilight mood permeates this upscale setting, draped in a {argument name="color palette" default="cool, desaturated split-complementary"} color palette where moody, soft diffused lighting cascades gently from above. The cool blue ambient dusk temperature washes over the scene, while the ground bollards emit a contrasting warm orange and yellow accent glow that creates subtle highlights directly along the concrete path. Soft, short, gradual gray shadows pool delicately under the man's facial features and within the natural folds of his linen garments, establishing a calm, low-contrast, and evenly filled atmospheric depth. Captured straight on as highly realistic digital photography mimicking a 50mm to 85mm lens at an aperture of f/2.8 to f/4 with a 1/125s shutter speed, the image balances tack-sharp focal clarity on the subject's face with a medium depth of field that gently softens the background. The sophisticated aesthetic is finalized with intentional post-processing that introduces visible digital noise grain, lifted blacks for a soft cinematic matte fade, slightly desaturated greens, and split toning that pushes cool blues into the shadows and warm golden hues into the practical midtone highlights, all elegantly framed in a 9:16 aspect ratio.

prompts.title: Architectural Blueprint to Miniature Japanese Inn Scene
prompts.prompt: The architectural blueprint of a traditional Japanese inn is spread out on a drafting table, and the space sublimates into a habitable miniature. In the tatami-matted guest room, futons and low tables are laid out, and a traveler in a yukata is gazing at a dry landscape garden under construction. The large hot spring bath has a cypress tub and a bamboo spout, and steam rises as an elderly guest quietly soaks in the water. In the Kaiseki dining room, lacquer trays are placed on cushions, and the warm light of lanterns shines through the shoji screens. The walls exist simultaneously as lines and as actual partitions. The lines of sight drawn on the floor plan become the actual scenery between the spaces. The movement lines of people appear as faint traces. Figures at architectural scale become small residents living small lives, and the cross-section reveals the vertical relationships. Architectural tools such as scales and pencils are arranged around the scene.

prompts.title: Floating Philippines Island Travel Portrait

She is wearing a luxurious beige travel suit with a modern fitted blazer and tailored pants, paired with a black inner top and stylish brown leather boots. Her pose is relaxed, confident, and natural, looking slightly toward the horizon with accurate anatomy and cinematic posture. Beside her are a matte black suitcase and a luxury tan leather backpack with highly detailed textures, enhancing the premium travel aesthetic. The floating island is surrounded by a bright blue sky filled with soft volumetric clouds. Two commercial airplanes fly far in the background with subtle contrails. Lighting is warm natural sunlight with cinematic softness, realistic shadows, HDR global illumination, and depth of field. prompts.title: Surreal Cinematic Digital Illustration Prompt
prompts.prompt: Transform the uploaded image into a high-impact digital illustration using the image as a strict facial reference. Face Match (Strict): Face match must remain 100% exact — identical facial structure, proportions, jawline, cheekbones, nose shape, lips, beard density(if available in reference image) and trim, skin texture, hairline, hairstyle, and overall identity. Do not beautify, stylize, or alter facial features. Subject & Pose: A young Eastern European man is shown in a clean side-profile pose (not extreme profile), facing toward the right side of the frame. His head is slightly raised, chin gently lifted, conveying confidence, ambition, and forward vision. Expression is calm and self-assured. Clothing & Styling: The subject wears formal, modern clothing — a tailored dark blazer over a crisp shirt, minimal and elegant, reinforcing a professional and ambitious persona. No distracting accessories. Key Visual Element: He wears bold orange reflective sunglasses as the focal point. The lenses reflect a detailed modern cityscape with skyscrapers, urban roads, and green trees, symbolizing vision, ambition, and future goals. Color & Illustration Style: The face and clothing are rendered in muted grayscale tones, with realistic texture translated into a refined digital illustration style. Surrounding the subject are expressive abstract paint strokes and splashes in neon green and electric blue, adding energy and contrast without covering facial details. Background & Lighting: The background is dark and dramatic, layered with deep grey tones, subtle texture, and painterly motion. Cinematic lighting creates strong subject separation, clean highlights, and controlled shadows. Overall Aesthetic: Modern, cinematic, surreal digital illustration with a 2/3 photoreal-illustration balance and 1/3 abstract expression, poster-quality, high contrast, premium look. Aspect Ratio: 4:5

prompts.title: Dual-Orientation Optical Illusion Portrait
prompts.prompt: Create a dual-orientation optical illusion portrait. When viewed in normal upright position (0° orientation), the image must clearly reveal a young woman’s left-facing side profile. When the image is rotated 180 degrees (phone flipped upside down), the same composition must reveal an elderly woman’s side profile. Both identities must share the exact same contour structure and occupy identical spatial boundaries. No separate drawings, no split screen, no overlay. The transformation must occur purely through contour reinterpretation and structural ambiguity. Design the contour so that: The young woman’s chin becomes the elderly woman’s nose when rotated. The young woman’s ear becomes the elderly woman’s eye socket. The young woman’s neckline becomes the elderly woman’s mouth and chin structure. Apply a Moiré interference surface using ultra-thin radial or dual-frequency line patterns across the entire composition. The interference pattern must enhance depth without breaking the dual-orientation illusion. Strict monochrome palette. Black background (#000000) with white or light gray line structures only. No color. No gradients except those created by line density. No blur. No texture noise. Ultra-precise vector alignment. High contrast. Clean silhouette edges. 8K ultra-high resolution. Aspect ratio 4:5. The illusion must be readable in both orientations.

prompts.title: Male Fashion Portrait in European Street
prompts.prompt: A {argument name="gender" default="young adult male"} stands in the center-right of the frame, his body facing the straight-on camera but angled slightly to the left, his level shoulders grounding a confident, deliberately posed stance. His short, dark wavy pompadour hair is styled upward with natural matte textures, crowning a face with a relaxed, closed-mouth expression and calm eyes that gaze off-camera to the left, anchoring the primary focal point. He is dressed in a {argument name="shirt color" default="dark forest green"} long-sleeve button-down shirt that hangs open to the mid-chest, exposing warm bronze skin and a silver necklace that rests softly against his chest, tucked neatly into dark blackish-brown trousers secured by a black belt. Behind him, an asymmetrically balanced, deep historic European street unfurls, featuring a slightly blurred midground on the right where a weathered wrought-iron grille with curved dark metal bars overlays a warm yellow-lit window display, set into a matte, warm gray-tan wall of textured plaster and vertically lined cut stone blocks with aged, weathered corners. He stands on {argument name="stone paving" default="cool gray rectangular stone paving slabs"}, while the left background descends into a beautifully out-of-focus street canyon populated by casual pedestrians, including one softly blurred figure in a beige coat, beneath two worn circular red traffic signs with solid white centers. The calm, overcast atmosphere provides a moderate, soft, diffused natural daylight from above and slightly front-left, washing the scene in a warm complementary palette of deep greens, stone tans, and rich skin tones. Subtle, delicate highlights grace his forehead, the bridge of his nose, cheekbones, and left shoulder, while short, soft-edged gray shadows pool naturally under his chin, along the right side of his face and neck, and deep within the folds of his green shirt. Captured with tack-sharp precision using an 85mm lens at f/2.8 for a medium depth of field that separates the subject from the blurred background, the realistic digital portrait features a smooth texture with subtle digital noise, enhanced in post-processing with a warm color grade emphasizing greens and skin tones, slightly faded blacks for a cinematic filmic look, and a gentle vignette, all beautifully framed in a 4:5 aspect ratio.

prompts.title: Red Monochrome Fashion Studio Portrait
prompts.prompt: Ultra-realistic fashion portrait photography, UHD 18K, vertical aspect ratio 2:3, cinematic editorial masterpiece. A {argument name="subject" default="young women"} sits casually on a simple chair in the middle of a minimalist studio entirely covered in {argument name="color theme" default="intense, bright red"}. The camera is positioned at an extreme low angle from below, creating a dominant and dramatic perspective that makes the figure appear strong, charismatic, and alluring. The women sits with her body slightly slumped back against the back of the chair. Her legs are spread loosely, creating a natural and confident pose. Her right hand hangs loosely beside her thigh, while her left hand rests on her knee with loose, relaxed fingers. Her shoulders are slightly slumped, reinforcing a tired yet elegant impression. Her head is raised and tilted slightly back, revealing a strong jawline and long neck. Her eyes are gently closed as if she is enjoying a moment of silence, lost in thought, or feeling the warmth of the light enveloping her body. Her lips are slightly parted, conveying a subtle emotional nuance of exhaustion, longing, and serenity. Her wavy hair with a natural texture appears slightly messy, creating a lively and spontaneous impression. The skin appears clean, healthy, and realistic, with fine pore details and soft reflections of light on the face, neck, and hands. There are no tattoos on the body; the focus is entirely on the facial structure, expression, and the play of light that shapes the body's contours. The {argument name="clothing" default="long-sleeved white shirt"} is worn casually. The top few buttons are undone, creating a more casual and elegant silhouette. The sleeves are rolled up below the elbows, revealing the fabric's natural, realistic creased texture. The well-cut dark trousers are paired with a classic leather belt, providing a masculine and modern touch. The studio lighting is dramatic, with a deep red hue dominating the entire background and surrounding space. The strong red light comes from behind and to the sides, creating contrasting silhouettes and soft shadows that emphasize the shape of the body and face. A thin layer of atmospheric smoke or haze permeates the air, making the red light appear deeper and more cinematic. The background is kept simple, with no distracting elements, just a gradation of bright red to dark red, creating an emotional and intense atmosphere. The combination of the bright red with the white clothing creates a strong and eye-catching visual contrast. prompts.title: Music Curation: Audio-Visual Dioramas for Pink Floyd Fans
prompts.prompt: Do this for {argument name="input band" default="Pink Floyd"}: Input Variable: [INSERT BAND/ALBUM] (e.g., Pink Floyd, Daft Punk, Nirvana) System Instruction: Act as a Music Historian and Set Designer. Create a 2x2 Grid of "Audio-Visual Dioramas." 1. The Curation Logic (The Deep Cuts): Analyze Input: Identify the genre and sonic signature of the Input Band. Select 4 Hidden Gems: Identify 4 lesser-known albums from other bands that share this sonic DNA but offer a different visual flavor. The Translation: For each album, define the "Sonic Materiality": If Heavy Metal: Rusty Iron, Fire, Spikes. If Synth-Pop: Neon Glass, Chrome, Laser Grids. If Folk/Acoustic: Mossy Wood, Stone, Candlelight. If Prog Rock: Surreal Marble, Floating Prisms, Clouds. 2. The "Immutable" Container (The Vinyl Stage): The Base: Each diorama is built on top of a Spinning Vinyl Record acting as the circular stage floor. The Plinth: The record sits on a high-end, thick Audiophile Turntable Base (Wood or Brushed Aluminum). The Nameplate (CRITICAL TEXT FIX): On the vertical front face of the Plinth, there is a Polished Brass or Digital Display Plate. Text Rule: It must clearly display the [ARTIST NAME] in bold, legible, capital letters. 3. The Composition (The Sound Made Solid): CRITICAL: Do not just recreate the album cover. Build a world that feels like the music. The Structure: Architecture rises from the grooves of the vinyl record. Example: A wall of amplifiers, a surreal floating prism, a crumbling brick wall, or a forest of microphone stands. The Atmosphere: Use particle effects to visualize the sound waves. Visuals: Floating musical notes made of smoke, vibrating liquid surfaces, or shattered glass suspended in mid-air. The Figures: Tiny 1:87 scale band members performing inside this surreal landscape. 4. Visual Syntax (Per Panel): Panel A: Album 1 (Focus on Surrealism/Scale). Panel B: Album 2 (Focus on Technology/Machinery). Panel C: Album 3 (Focus on Nature/Organic Textures). Panel D: Album 4 (Focus on Light/Color). 5. Lighting & Atmosphere: Concert Lighting: Each box is lit like a stage show. Spotlights, laser beams, and stage haze. Depth: Shallow depth of field (Tilt-Shift) to make the vinyl record look massive. Background: Seamless Slate Grey to keep the focus on the colors. Output: 2x2 Grid, Hyper-Realistic Miniature Set Design, 8k Resolution, "Audiophile" Aesthetic.

prompts.title: Cinematic Concept Art for Ancient Abandoned Jungle City
prompts.prompt: ONE-CLICK GENERIC MASTER PROMPT — ANCIENT JUNGLE MORNING STYLE High-end cinematic stylized-realism digital concept art, AAA environment keyframe illustration, film matte-painting depth construction, professional game environment rendering, minimal line art, value-driven form separation, painted edges, controlled edge hierarchy, large-to-small mass construction, clean gradient digital color blending, hybrid hand-painted procedural texture, macro readability prioritized with selective micro-detail in focal structures, studio-quality composition, polished senior-level production finish. SUBJECT / SCENE In an Ancient Jungle Morning Setting, a long-abandoned jungle city plaza with cracked statues and vine-covered arches. ENVIRONMENT Primeval overgrown jungle landscape with monumental ancient natural formations, dense layered vegetation, colossal trees, tangled roots, mist-filled clearings, hidden stone remnants or forgotten pathways partially reclaimed by nature. Large readable terrain masses first, with deep environmental layering and strong spatial separation between foreground foliage, mid jungle structures, and distant canopy silhouettes. LIGHTING Fresh early-morning jungle illumination with low-angle sunlight filtering through dense canopy gaps in structured directional shafts. Light should clearly define major structural planes while allowing gentle atmospheric mist to separate depth layers and enhance spatial readability without obscuring primary forms. CAMERA Cinematic exploration-style wide establishing shot positioned slightly above ground level as if the viewer has just discovered the scene. Use natural foreground framing through vegetation or terrain forms, clear midground focal anchor, and deep layered jungle distance to reinforce cinematic matte-painting depth construction. MOOD Sense of ancient discovery, untouched history, and quiet natural majesty. The scene should feel like the first reveal of a lost jungle location in a high-budget adventure film or AAA exploration game. DETAIL CONTROL Maintain professional focal-detail hierarchy. Preserve large readable jungle masses first, secondary structural forms next, and apply fine detail only in primary focal regions. Avoid uniform high-frequency foliage noise or excessive micro-detail in distant canopy layers. QUALITY TARGET Ultra-clean studio-grade cinematic jungle environment illustration, portfolio- level concept art readability, strong depth hierarchy, and polished production- ready rendering quality.

prompts.title: Worm's-Eye Perspective Character Shot (Likeness Preservation)
prompts.prompt: A cinematic worm’s-eye perspective shot of the character captured from ground level, camera almost touching the surface beneath them. Ultra-wide 14–18mm lens. The camera is angled sharply upward, making the character tower massively in frame. Likeness Preservation: Maintain exact proportions, eye shape, stylization, and material identity from the reference. Do not humanize or reinterpret anatomy. Perspective exaggeration must come only from camera placement, not redesign. Composition: The lowest part of the character dominates the foreground due to proximity to the lens. Boots, feet, lower garment, or base form appear large and imposing. The upper body recedes dramatically upward into the sky or background. Head placed near top third of frame, slightly off-center. Pose: Grounded stance. Feet planted firmly. One foot slightly closer to the lens to enhance scale distortion. Upper body calm and controlled. No exaggerated motion. Dominance comes from stillness. Camera Behavior: Very close distance to foreground element. Slight horizon tilt for tension. Foreground sharp, upper portion slightly softened by depth falloff. Lighting: Strong upward rim light catching edges of the lower silhouette. Secondary side light sculpting volume. Subtle atmospheric haze above to create depth separation. Shadows fall downward toward the lens. Background: Sky-like gradient, large empty space above. Light beams or volumetric haze rising upward. No flat studio look. Surface Detail: Foreground textures extremely crisp. Material identity preserved exactly. No added wear unless already present. Emotion: Monumental. Immovable. The viewer feels physically below the character. Power through perspective alone. Negative prompt: No anatomy distortion, no stretched limbs beyond lens effect, no added accessories, no centered symmetry, no neutral studio lighting. ar 1:1

prompts.title: Octane-Rendered Floating Ecological Island
prompts.prompt: [SUBJECT] A massive floating island captured as a photoreal, physically plausible environment, rendered with Octane-level realism. The island is a living ecological system integrated with inhabitable architecture grown from stone, crystal, and bio-organic materials. The scene feels like a real, observable place suspended in the sky, not a stylized illustration. [RENDERING STYLE] Ultra-photoreal rendering with Octane Render characteristics: physically accurate global illumination, realistic light falloff, high dynamic range sky lighting, true-to-scale materials, micro-surface detail, subtle imperfections, and natural color response. No painterly effects, no stylization, no exaggerated fantasy lighting. [COMPOSITION] Wide-angle aerial shot, slightly offset perspective, as if photographed from a hovering drone or aircraft. The full vertical mass of the island is visible, with architectural elements clearly readable. Horizon visible in the distance with atmospheric haze for scale. Camera height slightly below the island’s midline, emphasizing weight and realism. [UPPER ATMOSPHERIC ZONE] Thin, stratified clouds interact with the island’s upper vegetation. Tall, vine-like atmospheric plants extend upward, realistically textured and wind-reactive. Small, semi-translucent floating organisms drift naturally, with believable motion blur and subsurface scattering. Sunlight diffuses through cloud layers, producing soft volumetric shafts. [SURFACE ECOSYSTEM] The surface terrain features realistic soil, rock strata, and dense vegetation with botanical variation. prompts.title: Athletic Man Lakeside Resort Wear Portrait
prompts.prompt: An athletic young man stands casually facing the camera, his weight shifted as he leans slightly with level shoulders and legs crossed at the ankles. He exudes a confident yet relaxed energy with a subtle closed smile and relaxed eyes. His dark brown hair is cut into a tight fade on the sides and back, while the top, about two inches long, is styled upward and slightly forward into a textured quiff holding its volume with a matte finish. The hair texture exhibits natural clumping and organic imperfections, complete with a clean natural hairline and slight flyaways visible against the sky. He is dressed in an elegant retro resort-wear ensemble featuring a white short-sleeve shirt with two prominent vertical light blue stripes, paired with high-waisted, creamy off-white pleated trousers and light blue sneakers. A silver chain rests on his neck. His right hand is casually tucked into his front right trouser pocket, revealing only a sliver of his hand and a metallic watch on his wrist, while his left hand lightly grips a weathered dark gray wrought iron fence for balance, his fingers draped elegantly over the rounded cast-iron finial with silver rings visible on his index and pinky fingers, complemented by a silver bracelet on his left wrist. He is positioned along an outdoor lakeside promenade characterized by deep spatial depth, standing on a light gray and white mix gravel path. Directly behind him, extending from the mid-left to the right, is a classic, carved stone balustrade made of muted gray stone, exhibiting rough matte textures, dark water stains under the top rail, and patches of lichen and dirt accumulating in its weathered crevices. To the left midground, a thriving bush bursts with bright pink blossoms and lush green leaves growing through a support structure, situated near a weathered vintage black metal streetlamp with a glass lantern enclosure. Expanding into the right background is a vast expanse of pristine, deep blue lake water marked by gentle ripples, where a small dark motorboat glides in the distance. Above the water, a large sloping mountain range dotted with small distant shoreline structures fades gracefully into an atmospheric haze. Bathed in bright, warm golden natural sunlight originating from a single moderately directional source at the front-left, the scene is infused with a cheerful and sophisticated luxurious vacation mood. The lighting casts soft but defined gradual gray shadows onto the gravel path behind and to the right of the subject, creating raked horizontal shadow patterns from the balustrade while also defining the right side of the folds in his clothing. Preserved specular highlights gently kiss the left side of his face, his left shoulder, and the top rail of the stone balustrade, while ambient fill light ensures vibrant, medium contrast across the beautifully complementary cream and steel blue color palette. Captured through the lens of a full-frame digital camera using a 35mm lens at an aperture around f/5.6, the image maintains a straight-on perspective and a medium depth of field, keeping the subject tack sharp with no grain while the majestic mountainous background and water are slightly softened yet clearly legible. The aesthetic blends modern menswear editorial styles with clean travel influencer photography, finalized with post-processing that includes subtle color grading to enhance the blue and cream tones, a slight shadow lift to preserve details in the dark hair and iron fence, and an accentuation of the golden hour warmth radiating from the subject's skin, all beautifully framed in a 4:5 aspect ratio.

prompts.title: Professional Creative Portrait in Teal Chair
prompts.prompt: A professional, high-resolution portrait of a {argument name="subject" default="man with a neat beard and messy dark hair"}, sitting in a plush {argument name="furniture" default="dark teal velvet armchair"}. He is seated at a slight three-quarter angle, body tilted toward the left while his head is turned to face the camera directly with a friendly expression. Details & Props: He is wearing a sophisticated tan or camel-colored blazer over a crisp white t-shirt. On his left wrist, a black smartwatch is visible. He is holding a sleek silver tablet in his right hand and a white stylus (Apple Pencil) in his left hand, resting them naturally on his lap. Lighting & Atmosphere: The scene features soft, cinematic side-lighting (Chiaroscuro style) that creates gentle shadows on one side of his face and body, adding depth. The background is a minimalist, solid {argument name="backdrop" default="dark charcoal grey"}, ensuring all focus remains on the subject. Technical Specifications: Ultra-realistic photography, 8K resolution, sharp focus on facial features, shallow depth of field, shot on a 50mm lens, professional studio lighting, clean composition, aspect ratio 4:5. Key Elements Noted: The Tilt: The "three-quarter" body position is crucial for that specific seated look. The Grip: I've specified the pen and tablet being held simultaneously to match the "creative professional" vibe. The Backdrop: Keeping it "solid charcoal" avoids unwanted textures or distractions.

prompts.title: Luxury Nautical Lifestyle Portrait
prompts.prompt: A medium scale portrait of a {argument name="subject" default="confident young adult male"} standing straight-on, leaning slightly to his left with perfectly level shoulders. He features short dark hair with meticulously preserved natural texture and sunlit highlights, a neatly groomed light beard, relaxed eyebrows, a direct gaze, and a subtle closed-mouth smile. He is dressed in a {argument name="outfit" default="crisp bright white unbuttoned linen shirt and navy shorts"}. His deliberately posed yet relaxed left hand rests casually on a polished metal boat railing with his fingers gently draped over the cylindrical bar, while his right hand rests near his upper right thigh, the thumb and index finger lightly gripping the black frames of his sunglasses. Immediately in the foreground, the metal boat railing showcases a gleaming stainless steel top rail supported by pristine, thick white rope netting woven into symmetric diamond patterns. The midground expands into a vast, {argument name="setting" default="deep azure blue sea"} characterized by gentle ripples and an immense depth of field, with a small, slightly worn white-hulled vessel moored faintly to the distant left. The deep background rises into a dominant coastline of rugged, uneven terrain completely covered in dense forest green pine trees sloping gracefully down to meet the water. Highly directional, bright, and hard natural sunlight from directly above bathes the scene in a warm, golden, sun-drenched summer holiday aesthetic that exudes an energetic, cheerful, and luxurious mood. This intense single-source illumination creates a highly saturated, high-contrast, split-complementary color palette prominently featuring ocean blues, crisp whites, and forest greens. Harsh, defined, deep black shadows are cast tightly beneath his neck, along his jawline, deep within the folds of the white linen shirt, and directly under the boat railing, while intense specular highlights are vividly preserved across the bridge of his nose, the top shoulders of his shirt, and shimmering brilliantly across the expansive water surface. Captured straight-on as tack-sharp, grain-free realistic digital travel and lifestyle photography utilizing a full-frame mirrorless camera equipped with a 35mm to 50mm lens. The deep depth of field at f/5.6 or f/8 effortlessly maintains the clarity of the sprawling landscape, while an ISO of 100 and a rapid 1/1000s shutter speed impeccably freeze the water's surface ripples. Post-processing involves high-contrast color grading with crushed blacks for profound shadow definition, pristine sharpening on the subject and marine reflections, and intensely boosted saturation throughout the blues and greens, entirely framed in a 4:5 aspect ratio.

prompts.title: Floating Sky Castle Digital Art Poster Prompt
prompts.prompt: A cinematic digital art poster featuring a majestic floating "Sky Castle" in the form of a miniature island, hovering serenely above an endless sea of clouds and dominating the composition. The floating island is shaped as a grand Western-style medieval castle complex, centered around a towering central keep with conical roofs, fortified stone walls, multiple cylindrical turrets, crenellated battlements, arched gateways, drawbridges, and multi-level ramparts. The entire structure embodies authentic medieval European castle architecture: massive stone masonry, narrow arrow-slit windows, wooden hoardings, and a grand central tower rising prominently in the middle. The castle seamlessly incorporates subtle Qing Dynasty Chinese influences: ornate tiled roofs with gentle upturned eaves crowning the turrets, intricate wooden pavilions nestled within courtyards, and decorative ridge ornaments on the main keep. The scene is alive with tiny Qing Dynasty inhabitants in period clothing: scholars in flowing robes, merchants with queues and silk garments, women in elegant traditional attire, street vendors with bamboo baskets, sedan chair bearers, rickshaw pullers, children playing, and horse-drawn carts — all bustling across the castle’s courtyards, bridges, and ramparts. The castle is intertwined with lush subtropical greenery: ancient banyan trees climbing the stone walls, lychee groves spilling over the battlements, lotus ponds in the inner courtyards, and winding rivers cascading like waterfalls down the floating structure. No modern elements — only a harmonious fusion of classic Western medieval castle design with delicate Qing Dynasty Chinese details, creating a fairy-tale sky fortress surrounded by serene natural beauty. The castle floats peacefully above a vast, ethereal cloud sea rendered in the traditional Chinese ink wash painting style, with soft misty gradients, delicate brush-like textures, and atmospheric depth. Completely free of any text, lettering, typography, or overlaid information — pure visual composition with no words present. Surround the floating castle with generous negative space for a clean, museum-like elegance. The overall layout is restrained, balanced, and sophisticated, evoking the feeling of contemplating a rare and precious art piece. Style: Octane Render, Cinema 4D, isometric perspective, micro world, living ecosystem, 8K ultra-high resolution. DreamWorks animation quality, intricate 3D modeling, delicate soft light projection, cinematic atmosphere, vibrant yet harmonious colors, warm golden-hour lighting with gentle lens flares and subtle god rays.

prompts.title: High Fashion Editorial Motion Shot
prompts.prompt: A high fashion magazine studio editorial shot set against a {argument name="background" default="dark, solid seamless backdrop in deep charcoal to near black tones"}, designed to create maximum contrast and dramatic visual impact. The environment is minimal and controlled, removing all distractions so the subject and motion remain the sole focus of the composition. Lighting is built around a hard direct strobe flash setup, producing intense highlights and deeply defined, razor sharp shadows. The flash freezes every element in motion with extreme clarity, capturing texture, depth, and impact in a single suspended moment. The lighting style is crisp and sculptural, emphasizing edges, contours, and airborne particles with precision. The camera uses a {argument name="lens" default="SUPER ultra-wide 12mm lens"}, placed very close to the subject to exaggerate perspective and create a powerful sense of distortion and immediacy. A low angle viewpoint enhances drama, making the model appear larger than life and amplifying the feeling of instability and motion. The model is captured mid stumble, moving forward with uncontrolled yet elegant momentum. One arm is thrown outward instinctively to regain balance, while the body leans into the motion, creating tension and dynamic asymmetry. Facial expression reflects urgency and focus, consistent with high fashion editorial intensity. In the hand, a {argument name="product" default="compact powder and blush palette"} is slipping loose, captured at the exact moment of release. The product is breaking apart in motion, contributing to the narrative of controlled chaos. A dramatic powder cloud explodes outward in mid air, forming a soft, textured plume that contrasts with the hard lighting and sharp shadows. Makeup brushes scatter through the frame, each frozen individually in space, adding rhythm and directional flow to the composition. Fine powder particles float and disperse, catching strobe highlights like suspended dust in air. The overall aesthetic is clean, high contrast, and meticulously retouched, maintaining luxury fashion magazine standards while emphasizing kinetic energy, unpredictability, and visual impact in a single frozen editorial moment.

prompts.title: High Speed Action Editorial
prompts.prompt: A high fashion studio action shot designed with a cinematic, hyper dynamic editorial approach that captures movement, tension, and frozen energy in a single frame. The scene is set against a dark, solid seamless background that absorbs light and enhances contrast, creating a dramatic void-like environment that isolates the subject and emphasizes form, motion, and lighting precision. The lighting setup is a hard strobe configuration, engineered to produce crisp, sculptural highlights and deep, defined shadows with razor sharp edges. Every contour of the model, fabric, and airborne particles is sharply defined through high intensity flash timing combined with a high shutter speed freeze, ensuring that even the fastest motion appears suspended in time with absolute clarity. The camera is positioned at a {argument name="focal length" default="SUPER ultra wide 12mm"} focal length, exaggerating perspective and adding immersive distortion that enhances speed and impact. A side tracking angle is used, following the model’s motion laterally to intensify the feeling of acceleration and directional force. This perspective makes the scene feel as if the viewer is moving alongside the subject in real time. The model is captured mid action, {argument name="action" default="lunging aggressively into a full sprint"} with powerful athletic energy. The body posture conveys urgency and momentum, with forward drive clearly visible in the stride, shoulders angled into motion, and core engaged. Hair whips violently backward due to rapid acceleration, forming fluid arcs that contrast with the sharp frozen lighting style. In the foreground and motion path, {argument name="liquid effect" default="an iced coffee is captured mid spill, exploding into a long, elegant arc of liquid suspended in mid air"}. Droplets are individually visible, frozen at different distances from the cup, creating a sense of chaotic precision. Crushed ice fragments scatter outward, each piece sharply defined and glinting under the strobe light, enhancing texture and realism. The composition emphasizes controlled chaos, balancing fashion editorial aesthetics with raw kinetic energy. The wardrobe is sleek and high fashion, designed to complement motion without cluttering the visual narrative. Fabric reacts naturally to speed, creating flowing trails and subtle tension folds. Overall, the image blends luxury fashion photography with extreme motion capture techniques, resulting in a visually striking moment that feels both cinematic and impossible, as if time itself has been stopped at the peak of action.

Scene Concept & Action The giant comic book lies open like a construction site of narrative. Mini characters are scattered across the pages, each performing a specific task: • some are drawing panels with tiny tools (pens, brushes, stylus-like tools) • some are painting color into panels • some are climbing panel borders like scaffolding • some are inspecting scenes, pointing, directing • some are physically interacting with the comic world ( lifting panels, stepping into frames) The scene must feel like they are building their own story in real-time. Perspective & Composition (MANDATORY) Camera & Perspective (Corrected) Low-angle macro shot, camera positioned close to the comic page Lens: 90–100mm macro (compression, NOT distortion) • Perspective compression must preserve consistent object scale • Foreground character appears larger only due to proximity to lens • No exaggerated wide-angle distortion • Spatial depth created through distance falloff + focus, not scaling • The open comic book stretches diagonally into depth • Panels form strong leading lines across the frame • Composition is intentionally off-balance, not centered • Some characters partially cropped by frame edges Foreground includes blurred ink tools, paper edges, or panel borders creating depth layering Depth of Field (CRITICAL) Extremely shallow depth of field • Primary focal plane: one or two mini characters in the foreground actively working • Mid-ground characters slightly softer • Background characters and panels fall into creamy blur No full-frame sharpness Focus must guide the viewer toward the “main worker” character Lighting Doctrine Hard directional cinematic light from top-left • sharp shadows cast across comic panels • subtle rim light separating characters from page • ink reflections create small specular highlights • shadows from panel edges create natural depth No flat lighting Environment & Surface Detail Macro-level realism of the comic book: • visible paper fibers • ink texture and slight gloss • subtle imperfections in print • panel borders slightly raised or embossed Tiny tools leave micro mar

prompts.title: Cinematic Hamster Deadlift Video Prompt
prompts.prompt: Ultra-realistic cinematic gym scene featuring a small tan-and-white hamster wearing a beige baseball cap, silver over-ear headphones, and a white lifting belt. Scene opens with the barbell resting fully on the ground on a worn wooden lifting platform. The hamster is in a proper deadlift stance — feet planted wide, paws gripping the bar, back straight, head slightly lifted forward. 0–4 seconds: Slow, dramatic buildup. The hamster struggles to initiate the lift — muscles tense, fur slightly trembling, paws tightening on the bar. Subtle body shake, controlled strain, deep focus. No camera shake. No text. No flashy effects. 4–8 seconds: The hamster successfully deadlifts the barbell in one smooth, powerful motion, lifting it from the floor to full standing lockout. prompts.title: Isometric 3D Diorama of Product Evolution Prompt
prompts.prompt: Input Variable: {argument name="topic" default="[INSERT TOPIC]"} (e.g., The History of Bread, The Making of Whiskey, The Story of Silk, The Evolution of Paper) System Instruction: Generate a hyper-realistic, isometric 3D diorama displayed on an unrolled antique map. Use the following logic to procedurally generate the scene: 1. Deconstruction: Analyze the Input: Break the topic into 3 Phases of Production (From Nature to Consumption). The Material Path: Identify the raw unit of the topic (e.g., Coffee Beans, Wheat Grains, Silk Cocoons, Wood Chips). This material will form the physical "Road" connecting the scenes. 2. Container (The Chart): The Object: A large, textured Parchment Scroll with curled edges, unrolled on a rich Mahogany wooden table. The Layout: An "S-Curve" Path winds through the center of the scroll, connecting three distinct raised platforms. The Timeline: Delicate black ink timeline markers (dates like 1600, 1850, 1920) run alongside the path. 3. Vignettes (The Production Line): CRITICAL: Do not generate Sci-Fi. Stick to Historic and Modern Classic aesthetics. Top Left - The Source): Concept: The Agricultural or Raw Origin. Visuals: Rows of crops, a mine, or a forest growing directly out of a wooden block base. Figures: Tiny farmers or laborers in period-appropriate rustic clothing harvesting the raw material. Top Right - The Industry): Concept: The Processing and Refinement (Industrial Revolution Era). Visuals: A factory or mill with Copper Stills, Brass Gears, Smokestacks, or Water Wheels . Figures: Workers operating machinery, steam rising from vents. Bottom Left - The Experience): Concept: The Final Consumption (The "Golden Age"). Visuals: A warm, inviting interior. A Victorian Pub, a Parisian Cafe, a Tailor Shop, or a Library. Figures: Patrons enjoying the finished product in a social setting. 4. The "Hero" Object (Bottom Right): Instead of a fourth building, the path ends at a Life-Sized "Hero" Object sitting on the paper. (e.g., A perfect porcelain Cup of Coffee, A Loaf of Sourdough, A Crystal Whiskey Tumbler). 5. Visual Syntax: The Path: The road connecting the buildings is NOT dirt or asphalt. It is a River of the Raw Material (e.g., A road paved with Coffee Beans or Wheat grains). Typography: An elegant Serif Header at the bottom: "The Evolution of [Input]". Lighting: Warm, indoor "Library" lighting. Soft shadows, rich wood tones, no harsh neons. Output: ONE image, 1:1 Aspect Ratio, Isometric Diorama, "Anno 1800" Strategy Game Aesthetic, High Texture,

prompts.title: Encyclopedia of Flavor Diorama Generator
prompts.prompt: Input Variable: [{argument name="cuisine or dish" default="INSERT CUISINE OR DISH"}] (e.g., Persian Kebabs, Japanese Sushi, Italian Pasta, Mexican Tacos) System Instruction: Generate a hyper-realistic, wide-angle (16:9) 3D diorama of an "Encyclopedia of Flavor." Use the following logic to procedurally generate the scene: 1. Flavor Profiling: Analyze the Input: Determine the Region , Staple Ingredients , and Cooking Method . (e.g., Kebab = Fire/Coal, Rice, Meat. Sushi = Water, Fish, Rice). The Terrain: The pages of the book must physically transform into the landscape of the cuisine. Grain: Rice or Couscous forms dunes. Liquid: Sauces or Broths form rivers. Solid: Bread or Meat forms mountains/cliffs. 2. Container (The Wide Atlas): The Object: A massive, horizontal Landscape-Format Atlas lying open on an aged wooden banquet table. The Spine: Runs horizontally through the center, acting as the "Equator" or "Main Road" of the scene. The Paper: Parchment texture. The edges of the pages are tattered and stained with spices (Saffron, Paprika, Turmeric). 3. Panoramic Composition (Left to Right Flow): CRITICAL: Do not place distinct plates. Create a continuous flow across the open spread. Left Side (The Origin - Agriculture): The raw ingredients grow out of the paper. (e.g., Wheat stalks rising from the text; Cattle grazing on parsley fields; Fishermen casting nets into ink-blue water). Center (The Process - The Kitchen): The spine is the cooking zone. (e.g., A miniature Tandoor oven or Grill built into the book binding; Steam rising volumetrically). Right Side (The Result - The Feast): The finished dish explodes in scale. (e.g., A mountain of Saffron Rice topped with the Kebab; A Ziggurat of Sushi). 4. The Micro-Population The Figures: 1:87 Scale (HO Scale) figures populate the landscape. The Action: They are working the food. Harvesting: Picking herbs from the margins. Transporting: Carrying giant peppercorns like boulders. Cooking: Using flamethrowers to char the meat or rakes to fluff the rice. 5. Lighting & Atmosphere: Aspect Ratio: 16:9 Horizontal. Lighting: "Golden Hour" side-lighting. It should skim across the texture of the food and the paper grain, emphasizing the "Landscape" feel. Steam: Volumetric steam connects the three zones (Left, Center, Right). Output: ONE image, 16:9 Aspect Ratio, Macro Diorama Photography, Octane Render, High Texture Fidelity.

prompts.title: Educational Commodity Universe Diorama Prompt
prompts.prompt: for {argument name="commodity" default="Coffee"} Input A is a Historic Commodity or Resource (e.g., Spices, Tea, Silk, Coffee, Gold). Deconstruct the commodity into 3 Educational Assets: The Core : Identify the most common or valuable raw form. (e.g., Spices -> A pile of Black Peppercorns. Tea -> A mound of Black Tea leaves. Gold -> A large Nugget). The Varieties: Identify 4-5 distinct variations or colors. (e.g., Spices -> Red Paprika, Yellow Turmeric, Brown Cinnamon. Tea -> Green, White, Oolong, Matcha). The Transit : Identify the historical method of transport. (e.g., Camel Caravans, East Indiaman Ships, Steam Trains). 2. Container Goal: "Commodity Universe" Educational Diorama. The Base: A large, square Polished Walnut or Oak Board sitting on a library table. The Layout: A radial/circular design in the center, flanked by narrative vignettes in the corners. 3. The Centerpiece The Metaphor: The commodity is the center of the world. The Sun: A massive, textured pile of the "Core" material (Step 1) sits in the exact center. The Orbit: Inlaid gold or brass rings ripple out from the center. The Planets: Smaller mounds or spheres of the "Varieties" (Step 1) orbit the center, creating a colorful spectrum of textures (powders, grains, solids). 4. Narrative Corners The Origin (Top Corners): Miniature dioramas sculpted directly onto the board showing the harvesting process (e.g., tiny figures picking tea leaves, mining gold, or shaking spice trees). The Journey (Bottom Corners): Miniature dioramas showing the "Transit" (Step 1). Detail: Use Resin for water (ships) or Sand for deserts (camels). 5. The Footer: Placement: Along the bottom edge of the board. Format: Three or four rectangular Wooden Plaques embedded in the table. Content: The name of a specific variety (e.g., "Cinnamon") engraved in serif text, with a physical sample of that ingredient piled on the plaque. prompts.title: Realistic Axonometric Miniature Model with Narrative Abstract Background
prompts.prompt: [Work Information Retrieval] - Target Work Name: “{argument name="Work Name" default="Name to be added"}” - Task: Retrieve the plot, setting, and narrative structure of this film/TV series/novel. - Goal: Automatically filter the most representative famous scenes or core locations, and extract their emotional core (e.g., sadness, hope, determination, reunion, destruction, tranquility). [Main Scene Construction: 3D Axonometric Miniature Model] - Present a realistic 3D miniature model in the center. - Perspective: Axonometric / isometric view. - Model Content: - Architectural details realistically restored according to the original work - Character actions and expressions conform to physics and narrative logic - Environmental atmosphere realistically presented (storm, morning fog, sunset, firelight, etc.) - Rendering Style: Physically-based rendering of realistic materials and light. - Effect: The model is small but detailed and realistic, like a “miniature replica of a real scene, illuminated by exhibition-grade lighting.” [Background Design: Narrative-Driven Realistic Abstract Space] - Pure white or monochrome backgrounds are prohibited. - The background is constructed as a realistic, abstract emotional space based on the “scene's emotional core,” including: ① Emotional Tones (e.g., sadness → cold blue-gray; hope → warm gold light; tension → dark contrast) ② Air Dynamics and Volumetric Light (light fog, dust particles, backlighting, etc., carrying narrative meaning) ③ Lightweight Symbolic Elements (petals, confetti, ashes, stardust, water ripples, etc., as emotional particles) ④ Spatial Depth (aerial perspective, soft focus, gradient light creating a deep void with “lingering flow”) - Goal: The background uses abstract light and shadow to hint at the context before and after the story, forming an emotional resonance with the main scene. [Bottom Layout: Work Name + Classic Quote] - Centered layout at the bottom. - Content: ① Chinese Work Name: “{argument name="Work Name" default="Name to be added"}” (Font matches the work's style) ② A sentence or line from the original work related to the scene (Elegant serif font) - The overall layout references an art museum plaque, simple, balanced, and textured. [Overall Visual Requirements] - Miniature model is realistic, precise, and has authentic materials. - Background enhances the narrative with emotional colors, volumetric light, and symbolic particles. - The entire image presents the realism and poetic atmosphere of a high-end, exhibition-grade narrative artwork. Direct output, size 16:9.

prompts.title: Photorealistic Hot Tub Portrait
prompts.prompt: A highly detailed photorealistic portrait of a young woman in her early twenties with {argument name="hair description" default="striking long wavy copper-red hair"} cascading over her shoulders, fair skin with natural freckles across her nose and cheeks, {argument name="eye color" default="bright expressive blue eyes"}, and a gentle subtle smile, positioned in the center of the frame. She is wearing a {argument name="clothing" default="fitted black long-sleeved top"} and leaning forward with her arms resting on the smooth white edge of an outdoor hot tub filled with clear water, her hands visible with small delicate tattoos on the fingers. The setting is a serene natural outdoor environment during daytime with soft natural lighting, featuring a background of tall green pine trees, rocky terrain, stone architectural elements including a large pillar, and a peaceful mountainous landscape. The image captures fine details like water droplets on her skin and clothing, realistic hair texture, and high-resolution cinematic quality.

prompts.title: Photo to Crayon Drawing
prompts.prompt: Transform the {argument name="subject" default="uploaded photo"} into a {argument name="style" default="cute childlike crayon drawing"} while keeping the original pose, composition, clothing, expressions, and background. Use {argument name="texture" default="colorful wax-crayon and colored-pencil textures"}, messy scribbles, shaky outlines, and uneven coloring on textured paper. Simplify the faces into adorable cartoon-style characters with big eyes and rosy cheeks. Keep the mountains, lake, trees, clouds, and sky in a playful hand-drawn style. Add a small rounded-corner reference photo inset in the bottom-right corner showing the original image, with a white border and subtle shadow. Vibrant colors, charming, funny, handmade, high-detail crayon artwork.
