prompts.title: Mocha Suit Editorial Portrait
prompts.prompt: A stylish, confident man stands center frame in a perfectly tailored {argument name="suit color" default="mocha brown"} double-breasted suit worn over a sharp black t-shirt, his eyes concealed behind dark geometric sunglasses while his expression remains poised with a closed, neutral mouth. He adopts a relaxed, deliberately posed leaning stance with level shoulders and legs casually crossed at the ankles, ending in polished black leather dress shoes. His left hand is tucked seamlessly into his left jacket pocket, while his relaxed right hand rests flat against the smooth, pristine top rail of a {argument name="architectural element" default="warm beige stone balustrade"}, fingers slightly spread in a natural drape. This balustrade, featuring classic carved repeating columns, traverses horizontally across the midground above a polished black marble baseboard elegantly detailed with white veining. He stands on a warm honey-brown wood parquet floor laid in a classic checkered block pattern. Beyond the foreground, the spatial depth extends deeply into a {argument name="location" default="grand indoor classical hall"}, characterized by matte plaster walls and out-of-focus intricate stone-carved grand archways. In the upper right background, an arched window fitted with stained or frosted glass allows bright daylight to stream in, while a small, pristine hanging spherical glass lamp in the left middle ground emits a soft, warm orange glow. The scene is bathed in a sophisticated mix of soft, diffused natural daylight from the front-left and top, blending seamlessly with warm golden ambient practical fill. This moderately directional light creates beautifully preserved highlights along the left side of his face, his left shoulder, and the edge of the balustrade railing, while casting short, softly graded gray shadows beneath him on the parquet floor and across the right side of his suit and face. The color palette is warmly analogous, harmonizing the dominant mocha browns, rich black accents, warm beiges, and the amber glow of the lighting to evoke an affluent, classically elegant, and highly polished mood. Captured as a tack-sharp, grain-free editorial fashion photograph blending modern menswear with classic architectural portraiture, the image is shot straight on using an 85mm lens at an f/1.8 aperture, 1/200s shutter speed, and ISO 200 to achieve a shallow depth of field with creamy bokeh that smoothly blurs the majestic background. Expert post-processing features warm color grading to emphasize earth tones, a slight contrast bump, and targeted sharpening on the subject, all perfectly framed in a 4:5 aspect ratio.

prompts.title: Fashion Campaign Triptych Layout
prompts.prompt: A vibrant, high-end studio promotional image featuring the same stylish young Japanese woman repeated across three side-by-side panels in a horizontal triptych layout. She must clearly appear as the same person in all three panels (consistent face, hair, skin tone, identity), with strong face consistency. Each panel shows her fully from head to mid-thigh (no cropping), centered and clearly visible. The character is a fashionable, modern Japanese girl with a trendy, stylish appearance, natural glowing skin, well-groomed hair, and a confident personality. Each panel presents a different stylish pose, angle, and expression: Left panel: wearing a {argument name="outfit 1" default="chic mustard yellow polka-dot dress with sunglasses"}, playful and confident pose, slightly tilted body, hand in hair, looking off-camera with attitude. Center panel: wearing a {argument name="outfit 2" default="colorful patterned headscarf, fitted red top, and elegant beige high-waisted pants"}, facing forward with a confident, calm smile, strong eye contact, fashion model posture. Right panel: wearing a {argument name="outfit 3" default="modern green sweater with light-toned pants"}, relaxed yet stylish pose, slight side angle, soft natural smile, hands casually positioned. Background: three bold gradient panels (orange, purple, blue), each featuring soft abstract curved shapes and subtle cloud textures, giving a premium modern advertising aesthetic. Lighting: bright, soft, evenly diffused studio lighting, vibrant color grading, high contrast, ultra-sharp details, realistic skin tones. Style: luxury fashion campaign, modern commercial photography, editorial magazine quality, highly detailed, cinematic polish. Strict requirements: same Japanese girl in all panels, stylish fashion-focused appearance, different poses and angles in each panel, no text, no logos, no typography, no stickers, no branding elements, no cropping of characters, full composition visible, perfectly balanced horizontal layout.

prompts.title: Object-Based World: Reality Unfolding from a Frozen Object
prompts.prompt: Cinematic 3D composition centered on a {argument name="object" default="[OBJECT]"}, frozen at the instant it releases something far bigger than itself. From within it, an entire {argument name="world style" default="[WORLD STYLE / THEME]"} reality unfolds, spilling outward into sweeping environments, towering forms, and dynamic motion that suggests this world was hidden there all along. The object doesn’t just contain the world — it becomes part of it, with its shapes transforming into terrain, architecture, and symbolic landmarks. Small figures, machines, or creatures navigate the scene, adding life, scale, and narrative. The moment balances between dream and physics, where visual logic holds even as reality stretches. The scene is charged with [ATMOSPHERE: glow, fog, particles, smoke, energy], amplifying the sense of rupture and emergence. A subtle hint of the real world remains visible around the edges, anchoring the spectacle in realism. Hyper-detailed textures, dramatic lighting, cinematic depth, ultra-realistic, 8K, concept art finish.

prompts.title: Photorealistic Superhero on Skyscraper Rooftop
prompts.prompt: A superhero in a red and blue spider suit sits on the edge of a skyscraper rooftop, frontal view, camera at eye level, waist-length medium shot. The pose is identical to the first shot: the body is slightly leaning forward, one hand resting on the knee, a static, cinematic composition. The mask is removed and held in the hand or lowered downwards. Face: Use the face from the uploaded reference photo 2 (identity reference 2), as photorealistic as possible, without stylization, with natural skin texture and natural shadows. Expression: calm, pensive, slightly tired, with a dramatic mood. The suit is completely identical to the first shot: red and blue, micro-mesh texture, 3D webbing, realistic fabric, and retains a small torn detail on the shoulder. Physically correct fit. The background corresponds to the camera's 180-degree rotation around the hero: another part of the roof features industrial elements—ventilation units, metal structures, and technical equipment. Beyond the roof are lower city buildings, an urban landscape, concrete facades, and a subtle industrial atmosphere. The city is slightly blurred (shallow depth of field). Atmospheric haze. The lighting is identical to the first shot: an overcast day, soft, diffused light, and a cloudy sky, without harsh shadows. The light falls as naturally as in the first scene. The color correction is exactly the same as in photo 1: a cool bluish-teal tone, muted colors, reduced saturation, soft contrast, a slight gray-green tint in the shadows, and a darkened, not bright, red suit. A dramatic, calm, cinematic tone. Camera: 70–100mm lens, cinematic framing, shallow depth of field, hero in focus, background slightly blurred. Ultra-realistic, film still, subtle film grain, physically accurate lighting, cinematic superhero movie 2010s style. Maximum realism, the feeling of a real film frame, without CGI stylization.

prompts.title: 2x2 Grid Product Invention Visualization (Patent/Marketing)
prompts.prompt: Input Variable: {argument name="input objects" default="[INSERT 1 or 2 OBJECTS]"} Instruction: Act as a Visionary Industrial Designer and Patent Clerk. Create a 2x2 Grid visualizing the invention of a new product based on the Input. Innovation Logic : Analyze Functions: Identify the primary utility of Input A and Input B. The Fusion: Combine them into a single, cohesive device that solves a specific (niche) problem. If 2 Inputs: Hybridize them (e.g., Mug + Grater = A self-cooling mug with a garnish shaver). If 1 Input: Evolve it (e.g., Toothbrush = A self-sanitizing, toothpaste-injecting smart wand). The Branding: Generate a catchy, corporate product name (e.g., "The Breeze-Grate™", "Solar-Brella Pro"). The Visual Structure (The 2x2 Grid): CRITICAL: The image must be split into 4 distinct quadrants with different visual styles. Panel 1 (Top Left): The Exploded Patent View Style: Black & White Technical Line Art. Thin distinct lines, no shading. Content: An isometric "Exploded View" of the device, showing the internal motor, battery, or mechanism separated from the shell. Detail: Add Numbered Leader Lines (10, 12, 14) pointing to specific parts. Panel 2 (Top Right): The Functional Diagram Style: Black & White Schematic with bold arrows. Content: A cross-section or "In-Use" drawing showing how how the device works. Use Action Arrows to show airflow, rotation, or liquid movement. Detail: Show the "Result" (e.g., cheese falling, water spraying). Panel 3 (Bottom Left): The Product Render Style: High-End Studio Photography. Color, Glossy, "Apple/Braun" Design Aesthetic. Content: The final physical product sitting on a white reflective surface. It should look sleek, using materials like White Ceramic, Brushed Aluminum, or Matte Plastic. Context: Include a small prop to show scale (e.g., a block of cheese, a coffee bean, a hand). Panel 4 (Bottom Right): The Marketing Pitch Style: Editorial Magazine Layout. White background, black text. Typography: Headline: Large, Bold Serif Text displaying the [Invention Name]. Body: A block of clean "Lorem Ipsum" or readable text describing the "Revolutionary Features." Bullets: A small list of specs (e.g., "Dishwasher Safe," "USB-C"). Visual Syntax: Cohesion: The product design in Panel 3 must perfectly match the line art in Panel 1. Design Language: Minimalist, Ergonomic, Consumer Electronics aesthetic. Even if the idea is silly, the design must look expensive. Output: 2x2 Grid, Mixed Media (Line Art vs. Photorealism), 8k Resolution, "Kickstarter Campaign" Aesthetic.

prompts.title: Casual Maritime Waterfront Portrait
prompts.prompt: A young man sits squarely in the center of the frame, facing the camera with relaxed shoulders and a serious, composed expression, his mouth closed and eyes completely hidden behind dark reddish square sunglasses. His {argument name="hair style" default="short, messy dark brown"} hair features a natural, textured look with subtle flyaways. He is dressed in a layered casual outfit consisting of a {argument name="overshirt" default="thick beige corduroy overshirt"} left unbuttoned over a black crewneck t-shirt, paired with {argument name="pants" default="blue denim jeans"}. His body weight is evenly distributed as he sits, with his left arm casually draped over the back edge of a white boat seat, his fingers pointing straight down in an organic gesture, while his right hand rests naturally on his right thigh, the fingers loosely curled inward. He is positioned against the foregrounds worn white leather marine seating, which reveals visible seams and slight wear along the edges, while a weathered blue canvas boat canopy supported by metal tubes frames the upper foreground. The deep spatial midground reveals a thick, weathered cylindrical wooden docking bollard tightly wrapped with white rope at its base on the right side, giving way to a wide expanse of choppy, desaturated blue-grey water with small waves reflecting the overcast sky. In the slightly blurred background, a deep urban waterfront displays a matte, patchy-colored mix of traditional brown wooden multi-story houses and modern white concrete apartment blocks with balconies, all resting beneath a sloping terrain blanketed with bare, autumnal leafless trees. The entire scene is bathed in a calm, soft, and diffused frontal outdoor natural light, casting soft-edged, gradual gray shadows under his shirt collar, beneath his legs, and deep inside the boat canopy, while preserved specular highlights gently touch his forehead, the top shoulder of his beige shirt, and the smooth curves of the white leather seat. This lighting enhances the split-complementary palette of beige, black, denim, off-white, and desaturated blues, establishing a relaxed, breezy maritime atmosphere. Rendered in the style of clean, contemporary lifestyle digital photography, the image is shot straight-on with a 35mm lens at an f/4.0 aperture, 1/500s shutter speed, and ISO 200, achieving a tack-sharp subject with zero grain and a medium depth of field, finished with subtle color grading, natural skin tones, slightly lifted shadows, and mild background desaturation, all naturally framed in a 3:4 aspect ratio.

prompts.title: 360-Degree Equirectangular Panorama Prompt

Ensure lighting intensity and color remain consistent across the full 360° panorama. Treat the environment as lit by an evenly diffused sky dome rather than a single sun source. Apply soft global shadows that do not favor any horizontal direction. Avoid directional sunlight gradients that could cause seam lighting mismatches. Avoid modern elements, UI overlays, borders, frames, cropped views, fantasy styling, or broken panorama seams.

This creates harsh, defined deep black shadows cast heavily on the right side of his face, under his chin, and deep within the intricate folds of his shirt, while preserving brilliant warm highlights perfectly placed across his face, exposed chest, and left shoulder. Shot as a realistic digital photograph with a straight-on perspective and a slightly soft sharpness, the image embraces a travel lifestyle aesthetic characterized by moderate high-ISO digital noise authentic to low-light night photography. A deep depth of field keeps both the subject and the distant mountain structures relatively sharp, enhanced by post-processing that crushes the blacks in the mountains and shirt while boosting the warm highlights to make the city reflections pop brilliantly against the desaturated cool sky, all framed in a 4:5 aspect ratio.

prompts.title: Surreal Nature in Renaissance Oil Painting Style
prompts.prompt: SURREAL NATURE SCENE — RENAISSANCE OIL PAINTING STYLE (MODULAR) SCENE TYPE / SETTING A vast mythic natural valley rendered as a grand Renaissance landscape, with monumental cliffs, winding rivers, and layered atmospheric distance arranged with classical painterly balance and geometric harmony. PRIMARY FOCAL SUBJECT At the center stands a serene circular lake shaped like a perfect mirror, from which rises a small sacred island crowned by an elegant marble pavilion partly reclaimed by nature, serving as the compositional anchor. SURREAL NATURAL ELEMENTS The lake reflects not the sky above but an entirely different celestial scene; distant hills gently fold upward like draped fabric; flocks of birds freeze mid-flight in calm suspended formations, reinforcing dreamlike stillness. FLORA / ENVIRONMENTAL DETAIL Foreground filled with highly observed Renaissance-style botanical detail: wildflowers, ivy-covered stones, twisting olive trees, soft meadow grasses, and carefully painted natural textures emphasizing observational realism. LIGHTING / RENAISSANCE ATMOSPHERE Warm late-afternoon golden illumination with classical Renaissance chiaroscuro; soft directional sunlight from one side, long shadows, glowing horizon haze, gentle atmospheric perspective, and subtle divine-style sky radiance. COLOR PALETTE Traditional oil painting palette using earthy umbers, warm ochres, muted forest greens, deep ultramarine sky tones, soft flesh-like warm highlights, and restrained natural pigments consistent with historical Renaissance paintings. COMPOSITION / CAMERA LOGIC Classical Renaissance triangular composition: detailed botanical foreground, midground sacred island focal point, distant layered mountains fading into atmospheric haze; horizon placed slightly high for landscape dominance. RENDER STYLE / MATERIAL EXECUTION Highly detailed Renaissance oil painting execution with visible brushwork texture, layered glazing, soft pigment blending, subtle canvas grain, historical masterwork aesthetic, contemplative sacred-natural mood, timeless and poetic rather than fantastical chaos.

prompts.title: Pop-Up Book Diorama Generator Prompt
prompts.prompt: Do it for Terminator: {argument name="title" default="Moby Dick"} System Instruction: Act as a Master Prop Maker. Generate a hyper-realistic, macro-photography shot of a "Pop-Up Book Diorama." 1. Forensic Analysis: Analyze the Input Title to determine the visual components: The Biome: Identify the primary setting (e.g., Ocean, Jungle, Space, Desert). The Conflict: Identify the Antagonist or Monster (e.g., The White Whale, T-Rex, Darth Vader). The Vessel/Hero: Identify the main vehicle or protagonist (e.g., The Pequod, The Jeep, The Millennium Falcon). The Materiality: Identify the texture of the world (e.g., Wood & Water; Amber & Leaf; Metal & Stars). 2. Container (The Open Book): The Object: A massive, vintage, leather-bound hardcover book lying flat on a wooden desk. The Transformation: The book is open to the middle. The pages do not just lie flat; they physically mutate into the "Biome" identified in Step 1. Example: If Ocean, the pages turn into turbulent resin waves. If Desert, they turn into dunes. 3. Typography (The Floating Title): The Text: The [Title of the Input] rises out of the landscape as massive, 3D block letters. Integration: The letters must interact with the environment. Texture: The letters are made of materials from the story (e.g., Driftwood, Stone, Bone). Placement: The waves crash over the letters; vines wrap around the letters. 4. The Action Scene : CRITICAL: Construct a specific scene using miniature models on top of the book. The Threat: Place the "Antagonist" looming large in the background (e.g., The Whale breaching behind the text). The Hero: Place the "Vessel" or "Protagonist" navigating the terrain in the foreground (e.g., A tiny ship rocking on the waves). Scale: The scene must look like a high-end model kit (1:87 scale). 5. Lighting & Atmosphere: The Lamp: A vintage brass desk lamp is visible in the corner, casting a warm, directional "reading light" onto the scene. Atmosphere: Magical realism. The water should glisten; the fog should swirl. Depth: Shallow depth of field to blur the edge of the desk, keeping focus on the book. Output: ONE image, 16:9 Aspect Ratio, Cinematic Miniature Photography, 8k Resolution.

prompts.title: Confident Sunset Beach Portrait
prompts.prompt: A confident young bearded man stands anchoring the left-center of the composition, turned at a relaxed 45-degree angle with his thick, textured, wavy hair blown slightly by the coastal wind. He is dressed in a loose, unbuttoned light blue and white vertically striped shirt layered over a white tee, paired with white trousers, and accessorized with a thin silver chain resting on his chest. His left hand is relaxed and mostly out of frame, while his right hand, adorned with silver rings and a silver watch with a brown leather strap, is raised to his face. His index finger and thumb lightly grip the metallic bridge and top frame of his dark-tinted sunglasses in a deliberately posed yet natural gesture. Behind the dark lenses, his facial expression is composed and relaxed, with loosely closed lips conveying a quiet confidence. He is situated within a deep, expansive beach setting at dusk. In the immediate foreground, smooth, wet beach sand forms dark, reflective gradients from the receding water. Behind him, the midground opens up to an expansive ocean with active gentle surf, reflecting the vivid sky and leaving traces of white sea foam along the shoreline. The background sky stretches wide, accented by wispy clouds in the top left that catch the faint pink and orange light of the fading sun. A serene, moody twilight atmosphere dominates, driven by moderately directional, warm soft backlighting from the sun dipped just below the horizon, washing the sky in deep dusk purples and vibrant sunset oranges. This dramatic backlighting casts deep black, gradually edged shadows across the front of the subject that project toward the viewer, creating a high-contrast silhouette against the vibrant background. Subtle, golden highlights catch the distant horizon water, the metallic watch bezel, the rim of the sunglasses, and create a delicate rim light tracing the edges of his textured hair. Captured as realistic digital photography with a deep depth of field that separates the subject through luminous contrast rather than heavy blur, the scene embodies a minimal, lifestyle aesthetic shot straight-on. The post-processing features warm color grading, enhanced saturation on the sunset tones, slightly crushed shadows, and a slightly soft sharpness textured by atmospheric digital noise and film grain, all seamlessly framed in a 4:5 aspect ratio.

prompts.title: Surreal desert athletic campaign

Her body is arched in a graceful yet explosive leap, as if defying gravity. She wears a {argument name="top" default="sand-toned Nike sports bra"} with minimal branding and lightweight flowing training pants that ripple like fabric caught in windstorms. prompts.title: Modern Kitchen Indoor Lifestyle Portrait
prompts.prompt: A high-resolution indoor lifestyle portrait photograph of {argument name="subject name" default="[NAME]"}. ​Captured in a medium-full shot from a slightly low angle, she leans casually and confidently forward against a {argument name="location" default="kitchen counter"}, her torso projecting slightly toward the camera. Her right arm extends down, gripping the counter's edge for support, while her left hand rests gently on her thigh. She has her hair gracefully swept to one side, looking directly at the camera with expressive, slightly narrowed eyes and a playful, confident, subtle smile. Her skin features a highly realistic, glowing texture with fine pores visible under the light. She is dressed in a plain, {argument name="clothing" default="white, form-fitting cropped tank top"} that reveals her midriff, paired with high-waisted black dolphin sports shorts featuring white piping and a white drawstring tied in a bow at the front. ​The setting is a modern, well-lit domestic kitchen with a playful, alluring, and casual vibe. The background showcases light brown wooden lower cabinets with silver handles, a black countertop with integrated stove knobs, a white square-tile backsplash, and upper wooden cabinets. Subtle props like hanging kitchen utensils (a spatula and ladle) and a metal sink faucet blend into the elegantly blurred background. Bright, soft natural daylight streams through a large window on the left, casting a delicate rim light on her hair and the left side of her body, while creating smooth, natural shadow transitions on her right side. ​Shot with a 35mm lens at f/2.8 to maintain sharp focus on her eyes and clothing texture while yielding a beautiful background bokeh on the tiles and kitchen details. The lighting is perfectly balanced, simulating ISO 200 and a 1/250s shutter speed to prevent overexposure from the window, ensuring impeccable white balance and perfectly retained shadow details. Aspect Ratio 9:16.

prompts.title: Gaming History Console Architecture Grid Template
prompts.prompt: Concept: A timeline of gaming history emerging from physical consoles. Input: [{argument name="Game Franchise" default="Resident Evil"}] (e.g., Mario, Zelda, Final Fantasy) System Instruction: Act as a Gaming Historian. Create a 2x2 Grid of "Console Architecture." Evolution Logic: Select 4 eras of the franchise (8-bit, 64-bit, HD, VR). The Container: The base is the Physical Console/Controller of that era (e.g., NES Controller, N64 Console, Disc Drive). The Glitch: The game world "glitches" out of the cartridge slot or disc tray, turning into physical voxels or polygons. Panel 1 (8-Bit): The world is made of Lego-like plastic blocks. Panel 2 (Poly): The world is made of Sharp, low-poly folded paper. Panel 3 (HD): The world is Photorealistic Resin. The HUD: Holographic UI elements (Health bars, Ammo) float physically above the scene. Label: The front of the console features the Game Logo in chrome.

prompts.title: Epic 3D Architectural Blueprint Construction Scene
prompts.prompt: Epic 3D scene: a massive architectural blueprint of [Name] pinned to a drafting table, its ink lines rising off the paper into fully realized construction. Blue lines become steel beams mid-weld, floor plans inflate into furnished rooms, elevation drawings push outward into facades with working windows. Construction phases coexist simultaneously: foundation being poured in one corner while the penthouse is already inhabited in another. Tiny workers, cranes, and scaffolding swarm the rising structure. The flat drawing and the living building merge at impossible angles. Technical annotations float as dimensional signage. Architect's coffee cup sits at the edge, casting shadow across unbuilt sections. Extreme scale contrast, construction dust catching afternoon light, 8K, photorealistic.

prompts.title: Linguistic Evolution Tree Infographic Generation
prompts.prompt: Input: language or linguistic concept ({argument name="language name" default="language name"}, writing system, or phrase). Analyze the language's family tree, writing system evolution, key texts, and cultural spread. Optional Input B is a style reference (linguistics department / Rosetta Stone exhibit). If missing, choose ancient library meets modern infographic aesthetic. Goal: Vertical tree structure in clear case showing language evolution from root to branches, with miniature scribes writing different scripts at each level, and key texts displayed. Rules: - Tree structure showing language family (Proto-Indo-European → Latin → Romance languages) - 8-15 scribe figurines at different branches writing in period scripts - Include miniature versions of key texts (ancient tablets, scrolls, books) - Show writing system evolution visually up the tree - Add mini maps showing geographic spread - Materials: aged parchment, clay tablets, modern paper progressing upward - Label with language name, family, speakers, writing system(s) Output: ONE image, 4:5 vertical format optimized

prompts.title: Dopamine Decor Surreal Flower Swing
prompts.prompt: A wide-angle full-room shot of a maximalist dopamine-decor room saturated in candy pink and sunny yellow, every surface joyful and color-drenched. In the exact center hangs a flower swing: a wooden seat thick with fresh blooms, fat pink peonies and roses and bright daisies woven all along the seat and trailing in garlands. But the swing's two flower-covered ropes do not reach the ceiling: they rise up and dissolve into a single small glowing sphere of warm fire-yellow light hovering high in the center of the room, a tiny captured sun the swing hangs from, the brightest point in the frame. Around the swing, the petals she has shed are not falling: they drift slowly upward through the air, rising toward the glowing sphere in a soft reverse-gravity bloom. Seated mid-swing is a young woman in her early 20s with long glossy hair that lifts and drifts upward in the motion, partly veiling her face so only a soft smile and one cheek show, her identity half-hidden in hair and floating petals. She leans back into the swing with relaxed joy. She wears a fashion-forward Y2K look: a baby-pink cropped baby tee with a tiny glittery butterfly graphic, a low-rise pleated lemon-yellow mini skirt, white knee-high socks, chunky pink-and-white platform sneakers, small butterfly hair clips, layered beaded bracelets and a jelly choker. Around her the room is pure dopamine: glossy pink walls, a yellow gingham rug, inflatable furniture, a beaded curtain, daisy-shaped cushions, a lava lamp, shelves of colorful trinkets, potted flowers and hanging plants in every corner. Soft even daylight floods the room, bright and high-key, minimal shadows, but the fire-yellow sphere glows warmer and more saturated than anything else. Wide lens, moderate depth of field, faithful saturated colors, crisp textures. Joyful, nostalgic, playful, warmly surreal.

prompts.title: Surreal Ocean Light Gathering Portrait
prompts.prompt: A straight-on medium shot frames a young woman in her {argument name="age" default="early 20s"} with striking model-like features, standing waist-deep in calm pastel ocean water under soft hazy overcast light. The water is a gentle pastel teal and seafoam, the surface dusted with countless soft pale sunlight glimmers drifting across it. She performs an impossible, calmly deadpan act: she holds both hands cupped open just above the water, and the soft glimmers on the surface around her are drifting inward, streaming toward her palms in fine pale threads of light and condensing into a single small smooth glowing sphere of warm fire-yellow light hovering just above her cupped hands, the one saturated point in an otherwise pastel frame. Where the light has gathered, the water immediately around her softens a shade paler. She regards the captured light with a cool, relaxed, dreamy expression, head tilted gently toward it, unbothered, as if gathering light is simply something she does. Her dark hair is wet and slicked back, heavy with water, a few loose strands dripping and falling across one side of her face, half-veiling it. She wears a {argument name="outfit" default="draped halter-neck blouse in soft pastel butter-yellow silky fabric"}, the neckline a gathered twist-halter wrapping the neck and crossing at the chest, draping in loose folds, sleeveless with bare shoulders and open back. Below she wears a very short micro mini skirt covered in chunky pale yellow and soft gold sequins and iridescent pastel paillettes, gently shimmering, the hem sitting high on the thigh. Layered delicate gold jewelry: stacked thin bangles, a fine gold chain at the neck, slim gold rings, all soft and muted. Soft glossy lips, dewy pale skin. The background is open pastel ocean, pale seafoam teal blending into a hazy whitish sky, the horizon barely visible, soft and diffuse. Gentle overcast daylight, no harsh shadows, even soft illumination, a dreamy high-key haze over everything. The palette is dominated by soft butter-yellow and the single warm fire-yellow of the captured light, pale gold sequins, dewy skin, set against pastel seafoam teal, soft peach and cream. Modern digital camera, soft focus, gentle muted colors, natural proportions. Deadpan surreal and softly dreamlike, a girl quietly gathering light off a pastel sea.

prompts.title: Casual Male Portrait Alpine Lake

His relaxed shoulders perfectly balance his centered weight, with his left hand resting naturally on his left thigh, fingers curving gently downward to reveal a silver metal watch. His right hand casually crosses over his left wrist, loosely holding a pair of folded black sunglasses, his wrist adorned with a silver chain bracelet and a black cord bracelet. He is seated on a rough-hewn timber split-rail fence in the foreground, characterized by rounded horizontal rails and natural wood grain, with tall vibrant green grass and wildflowers protruding nearby. Behind him unfolds a {argument name="landscape" default="majestic, deep-set alpine landscape"}, leading the eye directly to a dominant, pristine midground lake. The water features a vivid turquoise and emerald gradient with a highly reflective surface and clear shallows revealing the bottom near the edges. A thriving, dense forest of green pine and spruce trees of varying heights sharply lines the water's edge. In the far background, towering, jagged gray and tan rocky mountain peaks reminiscent of the Dolomites rise steeply, their weathered ridges partially veiled by scattered white clouds in a light blue sky. The scene is bathed in bright, soft, natural daylight, diffused evenly from above, creating a calm, crisp, and serene outdoor atmosphere with neutral color temperatures. Delicate, preserved specular highlights grace his forehead, the bridge of his nose, and the shimmering surface of the lake water. The color palette is highly saturated, dominated by striking turquoise and forest green against the contrasting dark navy and beige of his attire, balanced perfectly by the light grays of the distant peaks. prompts.title: Italian Riviera Vacation Portrait
prompts.prompt: A young adult male stands positioned in the right rule of thirds, projecting a confident and serious demeanor with a closed neutral mouth and his gaze directed off-camera to the right, hidden behind black wayfarer sunglasses. He is dressed in a dark navy-black crewneck sweater and light cream-colored trousers. His head is turned right while his body angles forty-five degrees left, his weight shifted casually onto his hips as he leans. His shoulders are relaxed, with the right shoulder sitting slightly lower than the left. His classic side-parted hair, tapered to an inch on the sides and leaving three inches on top, is combed back and to the right with a medium-hold styling product that yields a subtle sheen; the smooth, slightly wavy texture features distinct individual strands that catch the light, creating a delicate halo of natural flyaways around a clean hairline and a well-groomed short stubble beard connecting to his sideburns. His left hand rests on a railing, wearing a silver link wristwatch while holding the base of a small white ceramic espresso cup with the thumb and index finger visible. His right hand rests gently over his left wrist and the base of the cup, with relaxed fingers naturally draped in an organic gesture. In the immediate foreground, a weathered, dark green vintage wrought iron railing with decorative twisted uprights and swirling scrollwork spans the width of the frame. To the left foreground, vibrant red blooming flowers with bright green leaves thrive as they spill over a rough, unfinished matte terracotta red brick pillar marked by patchy grey mortar and weathered aging. Beyond the railing, the deep spatial depth reveals a pristine midground of deep blue-green lake water textured by subtle ripples and a distant boat wake. The expansive background rises into steep, densely forested green mountains dotted with traditional Italian villas featuring yellow and white facades beneath terracotta roofs. The scene is bathed in bright, highly directional natural sunlight striking from a forty-five-degree side and top-left angle, cultivating a warm, golden, and sophisticated Italian Riviera vacation mood. This single source of hard light creates a high-contrast environment with harsh, defined deep black shadows falling under his chin, down the right side of his torso and right leg, and casting directly onto the sweater from his arm. Brilliant preserved highlights carve a strong rim light along his left shoulder, left cheek, and left arm, accompanied by crisp specular highlights glinting off the silver watch face and the sunglasses. The complementary color palette balances the heavy navy and cream of the subject against the expansive lake teal, forest greens, and striking vibrant red floral accents. Captured as a realistic digital photograph with a straight-on perspective, the image utilizes a 35mm to 50mm full-frame lens locked onto the subject's face at f/5.6 to f/8, maintaining tack-sharp focus on the man while rendering the deep depth of field with a slightly soft yet highly recognizable background clarity. The clean, old-money luxury aesthetic is refined in post-processing with an enhanced contrast curve to deepen shadows, a slightly warm golden hour white balance, saturated blues and greens for the water and foliage, and pushed red luminance to make the flowers pop, all seamlessly framed in a 3:4 aspect ratio.

prompts.title: Detailed Cinematic Wuxia Scene Prompt: Dark Raven vs. Azure Frost
prompts.prompt: Overall Style Prompt: Chinese Wuxia fantasy style, cinematic quality, motion blur, abandoned ancient temple in heavy rain, gloomy sky, lightning occasionally illuminating raindrops and broken eaves, the image is full of power and speed. • Scene 1 (0-3 seconds): Dark Raven drags his sword, Azure Frost descends • Visuals: Rain pours down. Dark Raven wears heavy black armor emanating an ominous purple aura, dragging a massive chained dark iron greatsword with one hand. The blade scrapes the stone ground, creating dazzling sparks and ripples. His eyes are sinister as he looks ahead. Immediately after, Azure Frost lightly descends from the broken eaves of the ancient temple like a falling leaf. Her white and cyan tight-fitting outfit is sharp, her high ponytail flies, and the blue longsword in her hand is drawn with a 'zheng' sound, its cold aura pushing back the surrounding rain curtain. The two face off in the rain. • Cinematography: Extreme low-angle follow shot tracking the greatsword's path, then the camera quickly pulls back to show the full view of the confrontation in the rainy courtyard—one black and heavy, the other cyan and light. • Dialogue/Sound Effects: Dark Raven (low and hoarse): "{argument name="Dark Raven dialogue" default="You are beyond redemption."}" • Sound Effects: Heavy metal scraping, torrential rain, wind. • Scene 2 (3-6 seconds): Greatsword sweeps, light sword strikes like a flash • Visuals: Dark Raven suddenly exerts force, swinging the greatsword with both arms. A crescent-shaped black sword energy tears through the rain curtain and sweeps out. Raindrops evaporate in its path, and the stone ground is plowed open. Azure Frost's eyes narrow. Tapping the water surface with her toe, her body shoots up like a kite, executing a nimble side flip in the air, narrowly avoiding the sword energy. At the same time, using the momentum of her descent, the cold light of her sword tip condenses, striking straight at Dark Raven's throat like a meteor. • Cinematography: Fast-paced cuts. First, a side follow shot (Dolly Shot) captures the black sword energy slicing countless raindrops in slow motion, then switches to a high-angle view, showing the graceful trajectory of Azure Frost's aerial evasion and counterattack. • Sound Effects: Heavy whistling of the greatsword cutting the air, 'chichi' sound of sword energy evaporating, sound of clothes tearing the wind. • Scene 3 (6-9 seconds): Mid-air clash, sparks fly • Visuals: Dark Raven swings his greatsword back, colliding precisely with Azure Frost's descending longsword! "Clang—!" The immense power of the greatsword fiercely clashes with the nimble cold aura of the longsword, erupting in dazzling blue-white sparks and a shockwave that pushes away all the surrounding rain. Dark Raven presses down with his strength advantage, while Azure Frost uses her light footwork, tapping the greatsword with her toe, using the force to backflip and resolve the immense pressure. • Cinematography: Orbiting shot (Bullet Time). The camera centers on the point of weapon collision, rotating 360 degrees rapidly, finally freezing on a close-up of the moment of maximum sparks and the two forces counteracting. • Dialogue/Sound Effects: Azure Frost (cold and firm): "{argument name="Azure Frost dialogue" default="Evil will not prevail!"}" • Sound Effects: Huge metal collision roar, humming sound of power confrontation. • Scene 4 (9-12 seconds): Azure shadows continuous, black wall defends • Visuals: The moment she lands, Azure Frost launches an attack. Her figure turns into a cyan afterimage, her longsword stabs rapidly, instantly transforming into several fierce cyan sword lights attacking Dark Raven from different angles. The cold aura of the sword tips leaves streaks of frost in the air. Dark Raven lets out a low roar, swinging the heavy greatsword into an impenetrable barrier, forming a purple-black sword energy shield. Amidst the dense 'ding-dang' sounds, the cyan sword lights are all blocked, but the powerful impact still forces Dark Raven to retreat three steps, each step crushing the stone bricks beneath his feet. • Cinematography: One-shot handheld follow shot (Shaky Cam). The camera closely follows Azure Frost's attack trajectory, with slight shaking accompanying each stab, then quickly pans to Dark Raven's defense and retreat, creating a strong sense of immersion. • Sound Effects: Dense, crisp sound of sword tips hitting the barrier, sound of stone bricks cracking, heavy footsteps and panting. • Scene 5 (12-15 seconds): Ultimate collision, swallowing the universe • Visuals: Dark Raven is enraged, injecting all his purple energy into the greatsword, plunging it into the ground! Boom! A thick purple-black light column shoots up into the sky, stirring the clouds above. Azure Frost shows no fear, pouring all her cold energy into her sword. Man and sword become one, transforming into a massive, pure cyan stream of light, descending like a comet, striking straight at the center of the light column. The two collide with a roar! Time seems to stand still, followed by an explosive, blinding white light and a circular airwave that sweeps away all the rain, debris, and dead leaves in the entire courtyard. • Cinematography: Rapid close-up zoom out. First, quick cuts between close-ups of Dark Raven's cold eyes and Azure Frost's determined eyes, then the camera rapidly pulls up and back like a rocket (Crane Up), turning into a distant overhead view, showing the shocking full scene of the expanding white light and the airwave sweeping across the ruins of the ancient temple. The image freezes at the peak of the white light. • Dialogue/Sound Effects: (Before collision) Dark Raven's roar and Azure Frost's clear shout intertwine. • Sound Effects: Humming sound of energy convergence, earth-shattering explosion, followed by all sounds fading, leaving only the receding echo of the rain.

prompts.title: Jenna Ortega Kitchen Lifestyle Portrait
prompts.prompt: A high-resolution indoor lifestyle portrait photograph of {argument name="subject name" default="Jenna Ortega"}. Captured in a medium-full shot from a slightly low angle, she leans casually and confidently forward against a kitchen counter, her torso projecting slightly toward the camera. Her right arm extends down, gripping the counter's edge for support, while her left hand rests gently on her thigh. She has her hair gracefully swept to one side, looking directly at the camera with expressive, slightly narrowed eyes and a playful, confident, subtle smile. Her skin features a highly realistic, glowing texture with fine pores visible under the light. She is dressed in a plain, white, form-fitting cropped tank top that reveals her midriff, paired with high-waisted {argument name="shorts style" default="black dolphin sports shorts"} featuring white piping and a white drawstring tied in a bow at the front. The setting is a {argument name="kitchen style" default="modern, well-lit domestic kitchen"} with a playful, alluring, and casual vibe. The background showcases light brown wooden lower cabinets with silver handles, a black countertop with integrated stove knobs, a white square-tile backsplash, and upper wooden cabinets. Subtle props like hanging kitchen utensils (a spatula and ladle) and a metal sink faucet blend into the elegantly blurred background. Bright, soft natural daylight streams through a large window on the left, casting a delicate rim light on her hair and the left side of her body, while creating smooth, natural shadow transitions on her right side. Shot with a 35mm lens at f/2.8 to maintain sharp focus on her eyes and clothing texture while yielding a beautiful background bokeh on the tiles and kitchen details. The lighting is perfectly balanced, simulating ISO 200 and a 1/250s shutter speed to prevent overexposure from the window, ensuring impeccable white balance and perfectly retained shadow details. Aspect Ratio 9:16.

prompts.title: Nanobanana Prompt Engineering Workflow

prompts.title: World-in-a-Box Cutaway Diorama Prompt
prompts.prompt: role: You are a cutaway diorama builder and practical-effects set designer. Convert any topic into a “world-in-a-box” cutaway model that reveals internal layers and cause-and-effect using tiny agents, mechanical pathways, and labeled physical artifacts (no holograms, no bioluminescent vibes). logic: Identify the system boundary and 4–7 internal layers (inputs → processing → storage → decisions → outputs → feedback → failure modes). Build a boxed cross-section where each layer is a “floor” with physical machinery appropriate to the topic: conveyors, pipes, filing cabinets, gears, switchboards, kitchens, factories, archives, workshops. Show flow with tangible cues: string lines, arrows painted on wood, marbles in tracks, paper slips moving through slots, stamped tokens traveling between stations. Populate with toyified miniature workers/agents representing roles in the system (analyst, inspector, builder, messenger, operator) interacting with stations. Include one authority signal as a physical document pinned inside the box (audit report, signed approval, certification card, official notice). Add one small “failure corner” (jammed conveyor, leaking pipe, broken bridge) and one “fix corner” (reinforced part, upgraded tool, labeled improvement) to teach contrast. Compose for clarity: 3/4 view, strong leading lines, readable layers, tactile materials, subtle labels. Output: Draw Image (a) a single hero scene (boxed cutaway on a desk), (b) 5 layer/prop callouts with what they symbolize, (c) camera + lighting notes (soft practical lighting, gentle shadows for depth), (d) optional negative cues (avoid abstract fog, avoid neon, avoid chaotic clutter). Everything must be inferred from the topic. no texts

prompts.title: Old Money Men's Fashion Portrait
prompts.prompt: A young male model in his {argument name="age range" default="mid-20s"} stands centered in a deliberately posed medium shot, his body angled in a 45-degree turn with his weight evenly distributed and shoulders remarkably level. He wears classic menswear embodying an old money aesthetic, featuring a rich {argument name="jacket color" default="navy blue"} zip-up knit jacket layered over a dark turtleneck, sharply contrasted by crisp white trousers. His medium-length, swept-back brown hair reveals natural, fine flyaways, complementing a serious, sophisticated expression as his face turns strictly in profile to look away toward the right frame with relaxed eyebrows and a neutral, unsmiling mouth. His arms are elegantly crossed at chest level; the left hand rests softly on his right bicep with relaxed fingers curving gently over the arm and the thumb slightly separated, exposing a silver dress watch with a dark strap on his wrist. He stands isolated on a solid grey concrete street next to a dominant, pristine black SUV in the right midground, which features a canvas top, a taillight, and a hard-covered spare tire. A pristine silver hatchback is parked in the left midground, framing the urban street scene before dropping into a deep, slightly blurred background of an aged classical building facade. This weathered, matte stone wall reveals patchy light beige and warm grey tones, highly detailed with vertical structural lines, stone pillars, horizontal moldings, and recessed arched windows with dark panes. The atmosphere of urban elegance and relaxed wealth is bathed in soft, diffused natural outdoor daylight pouring from a single large overhead source, creating a cool, desaturated, high-contrast aesthetic. Short, gray shadows with soft gradual edges fall perfectly under his chin, beneath his crossed arms, and along the right side of the black SUV, while crisp, preserved highlights gleam beautifully on his hair, the bridge of his nose, the metallic watch dial, and the glossy curved paint of the vehicle. Captured as a photorealistic, tack-sharp digital fashion editorial portrait straight on from chest height, the image utilizes an {argument name="lens" default="85mm"} lens at f/2.8 and ISO 100 for a medium depth of field with absolutely zero grain, finished with subtle cool color grading, desaturated background tones, and enhanced contrast on the clothing, all elegantly framed in a 4:5 aspect ratio.

prompts.title: Luxury Car Selfie Collage
prompts.prompt: Ultra-photorealistic vertical 3x5 selfie collage, 15 panels, same beautiful young woman with a fully consistent identity in every frame. Pinterest-core it-girl luxury car selfie aesthetic, playful, flirty, feminine, social-media-ready, modern iPhone-style realism. She is inside a premium Porsche car interior with rich brown leather seats, visible stitching, and a subtle Porsche crest on the seat. Natural daylight comes through the windows, creating a soft warm glow. The atmosphere is chic, feminine, luxurious, and candid. The woman has soft Mediterranean beauty, glowing warm bronzed skin, real pore texture, natural asymmetry, almond eyes, fluffy dark brows, and plump glossy pink lips with wet gloss shine. Makeup is soft glam with dewy skin, subtle blush, softly defined eyes, and glossy lips. Hair is dark brown in a messy chic updo / low bun with loose face-framing strands. She wears small gold hoop earrings, delicate rings, and glossy pale-pink manicured nails. She wears a feminine pink halter-neck top, soft, flattering, summery, elegant, and slightly draped. Create a vertical 3x5 grid collage with 15 equally sized panels. Every panel must show a clearly different pose, expression, and gesture. Do not repeat the same selfie angle, same hand placement, same prop position, or same facial expression. prompts.title: Autonomous Financial Artist Prompt for 3D Stock Visualization
prompts.prompt: # Role: Autonomous Financial Artist You are a 3D visual artist with real-time internet access. Your task is to obtain real-time data based on the stock code provided by the user and generate a data visualization poster in the style of a “3D Isometric Miniature Diorama.” # ⚠️ CORE INSTRUCTION: SEARCH & REPLACE You must strictly follow the process of “search first, replace second, then generate.” The generated Prompt **must not** contain any `{{...}}` style placeholders; they must be replaced with specific text or values. --- ## STEP 1: DATA RETRIEVAL (Internet Search) Search for real-time data for the following variables: 1. **[VAR_DATE]:** Today's date (Format: MMM DD, e.g., JAN 07). 2. **[VAR_PRICE]:** The stock's current price. 3. **[VAR_CHANGE]:** Today's percentage change (Format: +X.X% or -X.X%). 4. **[VAR_REASON]:** Explain today's change with a very short phrase (English, max 5 words). 5. **[VAR_PRODUCT]:** The company's core flagship product or iconic building exterior. 6. **[VAR_COLOR]:** If up, use "Warm Sunny Lighting (Green/Gold accents)"; if down, use "Cool Overcast Lighting (Red/Grey accents)". 7. **[VAR_CALENDAR_COLOR]:** If up, use "Orange or White Block"; if down, use "Dark Grey or Blue Block". --- ## STEP 2: PROMPT COMPILATION (Replace Placeholders) Based on the search results, construct the final image generation instruction. Please fill in according to the following logic: **"An exquisite 3D Isometric Miniature Diorama, solid color background.** **1. Visual Anchor:** The main subject of the scene is a miniature version of **[VAR_PRODUCT]**, with the company's 3D Logo on top of the structure. **2. Core Information Component (The Calendar):** In the front corner of the base, place a realistic 3D Calendar Block, the block color is **[VAR_CALENDAR_COLOR]**. The date text **'[VAR_DATE]'** is clearly engraved on the block. *(Important: Ensure the date text is clear and sharp as a timestamp)* **3. Environmental Atmosphere (Data Atmosphere):** The overall lighting style is **[VAR_COLOR]**. * *(If up)*: The scene is full of vitality, with floating rising particles and lush green vegetation. * *(If down)*: The scene is slightly desolate, with yellowing or falling leaves, and small puddles on the ground. **4. Floating Information Layer (UI Overlay):** Composite AR-style minimalist labels above the model: * Main Label: '{{User_Stock}} **[VAR_PRICE]**' * Sub Label: '**[VAR_CHANGE]**' (with arrow) * Bottom Note: 'Note: **[VAR_REASON]**' **"** --- ## STEP 3: EXECUTE GENERATION (Execute Image Generation) Use the specific description that has been **replaced** in STEP 2 to generate the image immediately. --- # USER INPUT Target Stock Code: {argument name="stock code" default="NVDA"}

prompts.title: Isometric 3D Diorama with Living Human Texture

Subject (Visuals): A full-body, realistic human {argument name="description" default="[INSERT DESCRIPTION]"}. * Texture Rule: The subject must have "Living Human Skin" texture (subsurface scattering, pores, natural imperfections). * Important: He is NOT a toy/doll. He looks like a real person inserted into the scene. * Pose: {argument name="pose" default="[INSERT POSE, e.g., Sitting naturally]"}. Composition & Scale (Crucial): * Camera: Isometric wide shot (Full view). ensure the entire circular base, the subject, and all props are visible within the frame. * Proportions: PERFECT RELATIVE SCALE. The props (e.g., scooter, table etc.) must be the correct size relative to the human. Do not make the human giant or the props tiny. Environment: A realistic section of a {argument name="wall or building" default="[INSERT WALL/BUILDING]"} behind the subject. * Material: Real weathered textures (brick, cement, wood), not painted model textures. Props: * {argument name="prop 1" default="[INSERT PROP 1, e.g., Vintage Vespa]"} (Real metal and chrome texture). * {argument name="prop 2" default="[INSERT PROP 2, e.g., Pizza and Wine]"} (Real food texture). * *Note:* Ensure all props are present and grounded on the base. Technical Specs: Unreal Engine 5 render style, 8k resolution, global illumination, raytracing, sharp focus on the entire scene (deep depth of field), solid neutral grey background. prompts.title: Food History Diorama in Mandala Format (Spicy Chicken Wings)
prompts.prompt: Input Variable: {argument name="food item" default="Spicy Chicken Wings"} System Instruction: Generate a hyper-realistic, high-angle "Food History Diorama" arranged in a Mandala format. CRITICAL: The scene must be populated by Tiny 1:87 Scale Figures (Chefs) that correspond to the specific era of each ring. 1. Timeline Analysis: Analyze the history of the Input Food to determine the Attire and Tools of the workers in 5 eras: Stage 0 (Center): The Modern Chef (White Coat, Toque, Tweezers). Stage 1 (Commercial): The Fast Food Worker (Visor, Polo Shirt, Headset). Stage 2 (Domestic): The Home Cook (Floral Apron, Oven Mitts). Stage 3 (Industrial): The Butcher/Baker (Dirty White Apron, Cleaver, Rolled Sleeves). Stage 4 (Ancient): The Hunter/Gatherer (Tunic, Loincloth, Stone Tools, Fire). 2. The Composition : Perspective: High Angle (75 Degrees). Not completely flat. We need to see the bodies of the tiny figures, not just their heads. The Orbits: 5 Distinct Concentric Rings. The Boundary (The Catwalk): Between each ring, there is a visible Negative Space (a thin gap). This is where the tiny chefs stand, presenting the food to the viewer. 3. The Rings & The Residents Logic): The Center (Modern Pinnacle): Food: Deconstructed, gourmet plating on slate. The Figure: A Master Chef carefully placing a micro-green garnish with tweezers. Ring 1 (The Commercial Age): Food: Bright packaging, uniformity. The Figure: A Teenage Fast Food Worker holding a tray or a soda cup, standing next to the cardboard boxes. Ring 2 (The Domestic Age): Food: Casserole dishes or patterned china. The Figure: A 1950s Housewife or Home Cook holding a serving spoon or pie cutter. Ring 3 (The Industrial Age): Food: Cast iron skillets, tin plates, hearty portions. The Figure: A burly 19th Century Butcher or Cook holding a heavy knife or iron ladle. Ring 4 (The Ancient Origin): Food: Cooking over open fire, stone tools, raw ingredients (but cooked/charred enough to look appetizing). The Figure: An Ancient Human tending to a mini-campfire or grinding spices with a stone. 4. The Background Morph: The surface texture underneath the figures changes with them: Center: Polished Stone. Middle: Linoleum/Wood Table. Edge: Dirt/Earth. 5. Lighting & Scale: Tilt-Shift: Blur the outer edges slightly to emphasize the miniature scale of the people. Shadows: The figures must cast long shadows across the food to prove they are physically standing there. Output: ONE image, 1:1 Aspect Ratio, 8k Resolution, Miniature Photography style.

prompts.title: Cyber-Industrial Exoskeleton Object Transformation Prompt
prompts.prompt: Input Variable: {argument name="object" default="[INSERT OBJECT]"} (e.g., A Sneaker, A Human Skull, A Cheeseburger, The Letter 'A') System Instruction: Reimagine the Input Object as a complex, high-performance Cyber-Industrial Assembly. 1. Deconstruction: The Shell: Replace the object's natural skin with Matte Black Carbon Fiber and Gunmetal Grey Polymer. The Segmentation: The object is not solid. It is segmented into distinct panels (like Iron Man armor or a high-end camera body), held together by visible Hex Bolts and Rivets. The Gaps: Between the panels, leave small gaps to reveal the internal mechanics. 2. Internal Mechanics : The Piping: Where organic veins or structure would be, insert Bundled Industrial Cabling and Braided Steel Hoses. The Flow: These cables must look functional, routing power from a central core to the extremities of the object. The Glow (The Soul): Color: Identify the "Spirit Color" of the object (e.g., Burger = Amber/Orange; Skull = Cyan/Blue; Sneaker = Neon Green). Source: Hidden LED strips and neon tubes run parallel to the cables, casting a strong internal glow that spills out from the panel gaps. 3. The Narrative Micro-Detail (The Greebles): Scale Indicators: Embed tiny technical details to sell the scale. Vents: Cooling fans or intake grilles. Text: Tiny white serial numbers and warning labels (e.g., "CAUTION: HOT", "NO STEP") printed on the casing. The "City" (Optional): If the object is large enough, tiny architectural elements (antennas, platforms) can grow out of the mechanical base. 4. Visual Syntax & Composition: Background: Clean Studio Grey (Infinite Curve). The focus is entirely on the object's silhouette. Lighting: Key Light: Soft white studio light to highlight the texture of the carbon fiber weave. Rim Light: A sharp backlight to define the edge of the object against the grey background. Bloom: The internal colored LEDs must have a soft "Octane Bloom" effect. 5. Render Style: Aesthetic: Hard Surface Modeling, "Tech-Wear" Fashion, High-End Automotive Design. Camera: Isometric or 3/4 Product Shot angle. Output: Photorealistic 3D Render, 8k, Highly Detailed Textures (Carbon Fiber, Brushed Metal, Rubber).

prompts.title: Cinematic 3x2 storyboard grid from a single image reference
prompts.prompt: Use the uploaded photograph as the only visual reference. The person’s identity must be preserved with maximum accuracy: face, facial features, age, gender, body proportions, and overall appearance must remain unchanged. Do not invent or add anything that does not exist in the original image. Step 1: Detailed visual analysis of the source image First, perform a careful visual analysis of the uploaded image, including: Who is in the image (person, number of people, position in frame) Body pose and direction of gaze Facial expression and emotional mood Clothing and accessories Lighting conditions, time of day, color temperature Environment, background, and depth of space Overall emotional tone of the scene Step 2: Cinematic 3×2 storyboard grid After the analysis, create a cinematic 3×2 grid (6 frames) from the single image, as if it were a sequence of shots from a film. Global requirements for the entire grid: Format: one image containing a 3×2 grid All frames must be numbered 1–6, left to right, top to bottom Visual style: realistic, cinematic, non-illustrative One consistent character and environment with logical continuity Each frame must differ by pose, camera angle, or camera distance The sequence should feel like time is passing and the scene is developing No facial distortion, no change in identity or appearance Frame descriptions: Frame 1 (No. 1) Wide establishing shot. The camera is farthest from the subject, showing the full environment and context. The person feels like part of the surrounding space. Frame 2 (No. 2) Medium shot. The camera moves closer. The pose changes slightly, revealing inner emotion or state of mind. Frame 3 (No. 3) Low-angle or side-angle shot. Adds drama or tension, emphasizing body shape and perspective. Frame 4 (No. 4) Close-up or medium close-up. Focus on the face, eyes, and emotion. Fine details are clearly visible. Frame 5 (No. 5) Dynamic angle: diagonal composition or camera movement. The pose changes the most, creating a sense of action or momentum. Frame 6 (No. 6) Final shot. Calm, reflective, or emotionally resolved. The camera may be closer or farther, but the frame feels like a conclusion. Lighting & cinematic consistency: Lighting must remain logically consistent across all frames, as if filmed in one continuous scene. Depth of field, lighting, and color grading should reinforce a cinematic look. Final result: The output should resemble a professional cinematic storyboard, captured in a single take and location, with strong realism and narrative flow.

prompts.title: Visual Infographic of Ancient Chinese Official Ranks and Attire
prompts.prompt: Create a historical diagram-style infographic, 16:9 horizontal composition, titled "Visual Deconstruction of the Ancient Chinese Official Attire Ranking System." Adopt the aesthetic of ancient canonical diagrams and draw in the style of illustrations from ancient books. The image should display a comparison of the official uniforms of nine ranks of officials from the {argument name="dynasty" default="Qing Dynasty"}, arranged from left to right by rank: nine standing figures from the first to the ninth rank. Above each figure, use fine-line painting (Gongbi) to label the "Buzi (Rank Badge) Pattern" (First Rank Crane, Second Rank Golden Pheasant, Third Rank Peacock... Ninth Rank Quail; civil officials use flying birds, military officials use fierce beasts), with a close-up magnifying glass effect highlighting the embroidery details of the Buzi. Below the figures, label the "Chaozhu (Court Bead) Material" (First Rank Eastern Pearl, Second Rank Coral, Third Rank Sapphire... decreasing by rank), "Dingdai Hualing (Hat Ornament)" (Ruby/Coral/Sapphire/Crystal, etc., distinguished by color blocks), and "Mangpao (Dragon Robe) Pattern" (Nine Dragons/Five Claws/Four Claws, using diagrams to illustrate the difference in claw count). The top of the image features a "Rank Identification Quick Reference Chart": a table comparing the differences across 5 dimensions (Buzi, Dingdai, Chaozhu, Mangpao, Waist Belt) for all 9 ranks, with each cell marked by a small icon and text. The bottom of the image features "Historical Trivia": labeling "Why civil officials used flying birds and military officials used fierce beasts" (civil service requires soaring high, military service requires bravery), "The political meaning of the Hualing" (being granted a Hualing signifies imperial favor), and "Color Restrictions" (commoners were forbidden from wearing yellow or bright yellow). The very bottom includes a timeline showing the "Evolution of Official Attire through Dynasties": thumbnail sketches illustrating the style changes from the Han, Tang, Song, Yuan, Ming, and Qing dynasties. All text must be in Chinese: the top title uses the Small Seal Script font "Official Attire Rank Diagram: The Power Code Worn on the Body," and the bottom caption states "The clothing system is the visual representation of the feudal hierarchy." Use traditional official attire colors for the palette. The overall presentation should focus on historical institutions and clothing culture, suitable for historical education and cultural research.

prompts.title: Seed to Shelf Diorama Flowchart Prompt
prompts.prompt: 1. Analyze Input Variable: Input A is a Global Commodity with a distinct production lifecycle (e.g., Coffee, Chocolate/Cocoa, Wine, Denim/Cotton). Deconstruct the lifecycle into 3 Distinct Stages : Stage 1 (The Origin): The agricultural source (e.g., Coffee Plantation, Cacao Trees). Stage 2 (The Process): The industrial transformation (e.g., Roasting Plant, Fermentation Vats). Stage 3 (The Destination): The retail experience (e.g., A Hipster Cafe, A Chocolatier Shop). 2. Container (The Map Table): Goal: A "Seed to Shelf" Flowchart Diorama. The Base: A large, vintage World Map (blue oceans, pastel continents) laid flat on a wooden dining table. The Spine: A raised, winding S-Shaped Chute/Conveyor snakes through the center of the image, physically connecting the three stages. The Flow: The chute is filled with the product, which visually transforms as it moves down the path (e.g., Red Coffee Cherries at the top → → Brown Roasted Beans in the middle → → Fine Ground Powder at the bottom). 3. The Vignettes (The Stations): Construct a 3D diorama "Island" at each key point of the S-curve: Top Station (Origin): A square patch of terrain sitting on the map (e.g., South America). Detailed crops, trees, and farmers harvesting the raw material. Middle Station (Process): A compact industrial facility sitting on the map (e.g., Europe/USA). Metallic roasters, silos, smoke stacks, and factory workers. Bottom Station (Destination): An architectural Cutaway Box. The front wall is removed to reveal the interior of a shop (e.g., Espresso machines, tiny customers sitting at tables, baristas serving). 4. The Narrative Scale (The Workers): Scale: 1:87 (HO Scale) miniature figures. Action: The figures are not just standing; they are actively moving the product from the "Station" into the "Chute" (e.g., Farmers dumping baskets of cherries into the stream, Factory workers shoveling beans). 5. Lighting & Atmosphere: Camera Angle: High-Angle Perspective (45-60 degrees). Looking down the length of the table. Lighting: Natural Daylight. Bright, cheerful, and even. Shadows fall softly on the map. Depth of Field: Tilt-Shift effect. The top and bottom edges of the table are slightly blurred to make the models look tiny. Output: ONE image, Vertical Aspect Ratio (4:5), Miniature Photography, Educational Diorama aesthetic.

prompts.title: Kinetic Sculpture of Scientific Discovery in a Lab Notebook
prompts.prompt: Role: Science Historian & Kinetic Sculpture Engineer Input: Scientific Discovery: {argument name="scientific discovery" default="{{DISCOVERY}}"} Primary Scientist: {argument name="scientist name" default="{{SCIENTIST_NAME}}"} Year: {{YEAR}} Lab Location: {{LOCATION}} Phase 1: Concept Analysis Identify the defining eureka moment behind {{DISCOVERY}} Briefly imply earlier failed attempts through visual cues Select the key physical apparatus used or symbolized in this discovery (e.g. telescope, prism, microscope, equation, clock, lens) Phase 2: Visual Execution Goal: A single 1x1 frame showing a working “lab notebook contraption” frozen mid-discovery. Scene Rules: Base: An open, aged lab notebook on a wooden desk. Coffee stains, handwritten equations, rough sketches, and marginal notes fill the pages. The Machine: A functional brass and glass apparatus rises directly from the notebook pages. Steampunk-inspired but scientifically grounded. The Process: The apparatus actively demonstrates {{DISCOVERY}} Examples: light bending, gears rotating, particles flowing, rings orbiting, waves oscillating. prompts.title: Procedural Book Nook Diorama Generation Prompt
prompts.prompt: Input Variable: [INSERT TOPIC HERE] (e.g., History of Space Exploration) System Instruction: Generate a crowded, hyper-realistic "Book Nook" Diorama . Use the following logic to procedurally fill the scene with high-density detail: 1. Semantic Analysis (The Loot Table): The Totem: Identify the single tallest, most vertical object representing the topic (e.g., Saturn V Rocket). The Ephemera: Identify 4-5 small, specific consumer goods or artifacts (e.g., "Tang" Packet, Freeze-Dried Ice Cream, Mission Patches, Apollo 11 Manual). The Timeline: Identify the key visual evolution steps (e.g., Sputnik -> Lunar Module -> Shuttle). 2. The Immutable Container (The Corner Stage): Geometry: The book is NOT lying flat. It is standing upright, opened to form a Strict 90-Degree Corner . Vertical Wall: The back cover/pages standing straight up. Horizontal Floor: The front cover/pages lying flat. The Anchor: The "Totem" object (Rocket) stands inside the spine crease , acting as the structural pillar holding the book open. Paper Texture: The pages must look thick, rough, and heavily aged (like an 1800s manuscript). 3. The Vertical Plane (The Da Vinci Sketchbook): Density: MAXIMUM. Do not leave white space. Style: Sepia-tone Pen & Ink Technical Drawings . Content: The background should be a chaotic but organized collage of diagrams, timelines, and schematics. It should look like a scientist's field notes. Text: A bold, formal Serif Title at the top (e.g., "{argument name="title" default="HISTORY OF SPACE EXPLORATION"}"). 4. The Horizontal Plane (The Physical Clutter): Transition: The Totem (Rocket) seamlessly transitions from a drawing on the wall to a Physical 3D Model on the floor. The Scatter: The "Ephemera" props are scattered and overlapping on the floor page. They should not be neatly arranged. Material Contrast: The props must look like shiny plastic, crinkled foil, and fabric patches. This clashes with the matte paper. Scale: A tiny 1:64 scale human figure (e.g., Astronaut) stands next to the massive Totem for scale. 5. Visual Syntax: Background: Void Black. The book floats in infinite darkness. DO NOT render studio equipment, lamps, or tables. Lighting: "Museum Display" lighting. A focused beam hits the Totem, creating a long shadow against the back page sketches. Depth: The 3D objects must cast hard shadows onto the 2D paper to sell the optical illusion. Output: 1:1 Aspect Ratio, Macro Photography, High Textural Contrast (Paper vs. Plastic).

prompts.title: 16:9 Cinematic Storyboard from References

Panel 2 (Reading Back View): Recreate the action of “lying on the bed reading” from Image 1, but use the clothing of the character from Image 2, emphasizing the {argument name="weather" default="snowy scene"} outside the window. Panel 3 (Medium Shot Low Angle): Reference Image 1 for the action position. This is a highly dramatic perspective, reflecting the narrowness of the room and the spatial relationship of the character, highlighting details of the bookshelf and poster wall. Panel 4 (Full View/Fisheye): Add a wide-angle shot (referencing the perspective of Image 1) to establish the overall environment and set the mood of “staying home on a snowy day.”

prompts.title: Mediterranean Vacation Portrait
prompts.prompt: A handsome {argument name="subject" default="young adult male"} stands center-right, angled with his back to the camera, his upper torso and head turned precisely 135 degrees over his left shoulder to look back with a subtle, closed-mouth confident smile. He has a neatly groomed dark beard and short dark hair styled with a faded undercut, while dark round sunglasses rest on his face. He is dressed in a {argument name="outfit" default="crisp, all-white casual summer outfit"} featuring a bright white short-sleeve polo shirt and white linen trousers. His relaxed right hand rests naturally near his right hip, revealing a metal watch on his wrist, while his left hand holds a black smartphone casually near his waist, his fingers slightly curled in an organic grip. His shoulders are relaxed, with the right shoulder dropped slightly. He stands on a smooth, light gray poured concrete garden path that leads backward into a landscaped tropical garden, bordered on both the bottom left and bottom right by pristine, perfectly smooth bright white river rocks. To his left, a thriving Mediterranean Fan Palm dominates the midground with dense, overlapping spiky green fronds, accompanied by bright green lawn grass, an agave plant, and a black landscape uplight fixture. On his right, broad, paddle-shaped Bird of Paradise leaves stretch upward. In the top right background, a pristine modern building exterior features perfectly smooth matte white plaster walls topped with a dark brown wooden slatted roof overhang containing a black recessed cylindrical light fixture. An energetic, warm golden hour atmosphere envelops the scene beneath a clear sky blue backdrop. Highly directional, hard natural sunlight strikes from the front-right relative to his face, casting a harsh, precise geometric shadow diagonally across the crisp white building wall from the slatted roof. The intense illumination creates bright specular highlights preserved on his right cheek, the top folds of his white polo shirt, and the shiny, waxy surfaces of the broad tropical leaves. High-contrast, dramatic shadows stretch across the back of his shirt in medium gray folds and drop off into deep blacks within the dense layers of the foliage. The color palette emphasizes highly saturated, analogous greens and blues contrasting sharply against the crisp white clothing and architecture. Captured as a realistic digital photograph shot straight on at eye level with a {argument name="lens" default="35mm lens"}, the image is tack sharp on the subject and immediate midground foliage, gradually softening toward the distant architectural elements. Post-processing introduces enhanced vibrance in the organic greens and blues, balances the whites to remain crisp without clipping, and applies a warming tone to the highlights to emphasize the affluent Mediterranean vacation aesthetic, completely framed in a 3:4 aspect ratio.

prompts.title: Ancient Civilizations Innovation Bridge Image Generation Prompt
prompts.prompt: Input A is an invention or technology Analyze: how this innovation appeared independently or was transmitted across ancient civilizations (Egyptian, Chinese, Islamic, Mayan, Greek, etc.). Goal: Miniature bridge structure connecting 3-5 civilization "islands." Rules: * Base: ancient world map (aged parchment) as foundation * Bridge structure: ornate multi-level walkway with different architectural styles for each section (columns, arches, pagoda elements) * Each "island" platform: distinct civilization's version of {argument name="invention" default="Input A invention"} (Chinese compass vs Viking sunstone, Mayan zero vs Indian zero, etc.) * Civilization figurines: tiny scholars/inventors from each culture examining each other's versions * Include: trade route markers, tiny ships/caravans between islands, scrolls being passed * Center of bridge: the "universal truth" they all discovered (mathematical formula, physical principle) etched in neutral symbol * Materials: stone textures, gold leaf accents, cultural pattern details * Lighting: mystical golden hour with light ray connecting all islands Output: 1 x image, 16:9 landscape for maximum bridge span visibility, mythological epic photography

prompts.title: Infographic Prompt for Sweet and Sour Pork Recipe
prompts.prompt: Create a home-style cooking step infographic for 【{argument name="dish name" default="Sweet and Sour Pork"}】. 【Overall Style】 - Style: 8K ultra-HD realistic photography style, professional quality suitable for a food magazine - Image Quality: 8K resolution, sharp details, professional food photography lighting - Background: Real kitchen scene/marble countertop/wooden cutting board, shallow depth of field blur - Color Palette: Natural and realistic colors, true colors of ingredients, warm lighting - Layout: Horizontal 16:9 【Top Title Area】 - Main dish title (elegant Chinese font) - Subtitle: Cooking time / Difficulty level / Serving size - Background can use a blurred close-up of the finished dish 【Left or Top - Ingredient List Area】 - Title: "Ingredient Preparation" - All ingredients arranged realistically, neatly organized from a top-down view (flat lay) - Each ingredient labeled with name and quantity - Style: Instagram-style ingredient flat lay photography 【Main Body - Cooking Steps Area】 - 6-8 steps, arranged in a grid or timeline - Each step includes: * Step number (simple numeric identifier) * Close-up photo of the actual cooking process: - Cutting meat: Knife skills details, meat texture - Blanching: Boiling water, foam - Caramelizing sugar: Caramel color, oily sheen - Stir-frying: Dynamic movement in the wok, flame - Stewing/Simmering: Sauce bubbling, steam rising - Reducing sauce: Thick sauce, glossy meat pieces * Brief descriptive text (1-2 sentences) * Heat/Time notation 【Bottom - Finished Dish Display Area】 - 8K high-definition photo of the finished dish - Professional plating, exquisite tableware - Shot at a 45-degree angle or top-down view - Visible food texture: Gloss of the sauce, fibers of the meat, rising steam - Background: Dining table setting, chopsticks, small side dishes for garnish 【Photography Specifications】 - Lighting: Side-back light/natural window light, creating appetite appeal - Depth of Field: Subject sharp, background naturally blurred - Texture: Visible ingredient texture, oil sheen, reflection of the sauce - Steam: Real steam visible in hot dish steps - Color Temperature: Warm tone (5500-6000K), enhancing appetite 【Auxiliary Elements】 - Tips notation: Key techniques (e.g., "Blanch in cold water to remove odor," "Simmer slowly for 40 minutes") - Heat icon: 🔥 notation for heat level in each step - Timer notation: Duration for key steps - All ingredient quantities, step details, time, and heat should be automatically generated accurately based on the dish
